news.Title: NetApp & Nutanix Partner to Advance Hybrid Cloud & Virtualization
news.Content: NetApp, Inc. NTAP has announced a collaboration with Nutanix to integrate its Intelligent Data Infrastructure with the Nutanix Cloud Platform (NCP), advancing enterprise virtualization and hybrid cloud modernization. Expected later this year, the integration will combine NetApp’s ONTAP data management software and enterprise storage systems with the Nutanix AHV hypervisor, creating a unified platform for managing on-premises, cloud ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NetApp (NTAP) is collaborating with Nutanix to integrate its Intelligent Data Infrastructure with the Nutanix Cloud Platform (NCP) for hybrid cloud modernization.
• The integration will combine NetApp's ONTAP data management software with Nutanix's AHV hypervisor for unified management across on-premises, cloud, and containerized environments.
• Benefits include modernization of virtualization stack, independent scaling of compute and storage, and efficient VM migration.
• NetApp is gaining from strong demand for its all-flash arrays supporting enterprise and AI workloads, and partnerships with hyperscalers.
• NetApp expects fiscal 2026 revenues in the range of $6.772-$6.922 billion, but its shares have lost 18.1% in the past six months.
news.Keywords: NetApp, NTAP, Nutanix, hybrid cloud, virtualization, data management, AI workloads, hyperscalers, revenue forecast

news.Title: 美伊停火明天台股續漲？　 一風險必看
news.Content:
財經中心／廖珪如報導

在美伊戰爭停火的好消息帶動下，台股今(8)日聞訊強彈，終場大漲1531.56點，漲幅達4.61%，大盤收在34761.38點，OTC指數也同步大漲4 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停火好消息帶動，台股8日強彈1531.56點，收在34761.38點，距離歷史高點僅差不到千點。
• 千金股家數衝上40檔，部分PCB大廠距離千金門檻僅差2元，未來千金俱樂部成員有望增加。
• 製造業景氣處上升週期，股市行情由景氣引導，股市估值修正提供AI優勢市場良好進場配置機會。
• 全球製造業景氣持續回溫，復甦趨勢明確，AI需求強勁預期不致發生急遽去庫存現象。
• AI已成為台灣結構性出口與獲利護城河，建議聚焦電子零組件等熱門AI供應鏈族群ETF。
news.Keywords: 台股,反彈,千金股,製造業,AI,出口,獲利,ETF,供應鏈

news.Title: 1 High-Risk AI Stock That Could Become a Massive Winner -- If It Gets This Right
news.Content: Not every great investment starts out looking safe. In fact, many of the companies that eventually become the biggest winners begin as messy, capital-intensive businesses with real risks. Their upsides don't look obvious at first -- and that's exactly why they can be so large. The difference between those top performers and the also-rans usually comes down to one thing: execution. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just ...
news.AI_Summary:
• CoreWeave, an AI infrastructure company, provides computing power for AI model training and usage, with revenue growing 110% YoY in Q4 2025 to $1.6 billion.
• The company faces execution risks, including potential construction delays and overbuilding, which can impact revenue and capital efficiency.
• Customer concentration is a significant risk, with two clients accounting for 77% of 2024 revenue.
• CoreWeave competes with tech giants like Amazon and Microsoft, needing to maintain differentiation in its purpose-built AI infrastructure.
• Despite promising positioning, profitability is not guaranteed due to high growth spending and intensifying competition.
news.Keywords: CoreWeave, AI infrastructure, GPUs, revenue growth, execution risk, customer concentration, competition, profitability

news.Title: Will Alibaba Stock Recover Despite Slowing E-Commerce Market Momentum?
news.Content: Alibaba Group Holding BABA faces a difficult path to stock recovery as its core e-commerce engine shows mounting signs of fatigue. The company's third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, covering the quarter ended Dec. 31, 2025, revealed a troubling deceleration that investors cannot easily dismiss. Total revenues came in at RMB 284.8 billion ($40.7 billion), ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alibaba (BABA) reported Q3 fiscal 2026 revenue of $40.7 billion, up only 2% year over year, missing expectations and signaling fatigue in its core e-commerce business.
• Customer Management Revenue (CMR), a key metric for advertiser monetization, grew just 1% year over year, down from 9-10% in the prior quarter.
• Profitability suffered significantly, with GAAP net income down 66% and non-GAAP diluted EPS down 67%, due to heavy investments in quick commerce and AI infrastructure.
• Free cash flow plunged 71%, as the company burns cash to fund its quick commerce business, which may not reach profitability until fiscal 2029.
• Alibaba's performance contrasts with rivals PDD Holdings (PDD) and Amazon (AMZN), which maintained stronger growth and profitability.
news.Keywords: Alibaba, BABA, e-commerce, revenue deceleration, CMR, profitability, AI infrastructure, quick commerce, cash flow, competition

news.Title: Charles Schwab Warns That Asian and European Stocks May Not Resume Their Outperformance Even After the War Ends. What That Means for Your Global Portfolio.
news.Content: Charles Schwab recently sounded the alarm on Asian and European stocks as the Iran war and Strait of Hormuz blockage continued to rattle investors. (As of Wednesday morning, plans were reportedly in place to open the strait, but it's not clear what will happen.) The financial giant warned that countries on those continents are the most vulnerable to the economic fallout of oil shortages. Investors have to prepare for any scenario and act prudently when major headlines capture the spotlight. Here's how the ongoing conflict can affect your global portfolio and some of the things you can ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Charles Schwab warns that Asian and European stocks may face challenges due to the Iran war and Strait of Hormuz blockage, impacting oil prices and supply chains.
• Countries in Asia and Europe are more vulnerable to economic fallout from oil shortages, potentially affecting businesses and consumer spending.
• Even if hostilities end soon, impacts on growth, inflation, and commodity prices could linger due to damaged production sites and shipping disruptions.
• U.S. stocks are also affected by higher oil prices, but investors are advised to focus on fundamentals and long-term catalysts.
• The article suggests that while tech stocks face headwinds, staying invested for the long term and monitoring the situation is crucial.
news.Keywords: Charles Schwab, geopolitical risk, Iran war, Strait of Hormuz, oil prices, Asian stocks, European stocks, U.S. stocks, inflation, long-term investing

news.Title: Oracle's NetSuite Division in Focus: Will it Boost Revenue Growth?
news.Content: Oracle 's ORCL NetSuite division delivered a steady performance in the third quarter of fiscal 2026, but its pace of expansion raises the question of whether the cloud ERP unit can pick up speed and contribute more meaningfully to the company's broader revenue ambitions. NetSuite Cloud ERP (SaaS) revenues reached $1.1 billion in third-quarter fiscal 2026, up 14% in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oracle's (ORCL) NetSuite division showed steady performance with 14% YoY revenue growth, but lags behind other Oracle cloud segments like infrastructure (84% growth).
• Oracle is enhancing NetSuite with AI-powered innovations, including an Intelligent Close Manager and EPM agents, to increase platform stickiness.
• NetSuite serves over 43,000 customers globally, with AI monetization targeted through vertical-specific solutions.
• Oracle faces strong competition from Microsoft Dynamics 365 (19% YoY growth) and SAP Cloud ERP Suite (28% YoY growth).
• Oracle's shares have plunged 51.8% over the past six months, trading at a premium valuation with a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).
news.Keywords: Oracle, ORCL, NetSuite, cloud ERP, AI, revenue growth, competition, Microsoft, SAP, valuation

news.Title: The Best Stocks to Invest $1,000 In Right Now
news.Content: If you've got $1,000 ready to invest in the stock market, I can think of few better companies to buy right now than these three below. All three offer a combination of growth and value -- and with the recent market sell-off, these shares have seldom traded at this cheap a price tag. I think Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA), Microsoft (MSFT), and Broadcom (AVGO) are identified as top stock picks benefiting from the AI arms race.
• Nvidia leads in general-purpose GPUs for AI training and inference, while Broadcom develops custom AI chips for specific workloads.
• Both Nvidia and Broadcom are expected to experience massive growth this year due to high demand for their products.
• Nvidia's revenue is projected to rise 71% this year, while Broadcom's is projected to rise 64%, driven by its custom AI chips.
• Microsoft is integrating AI into its legacy products, with Azure cloud revenue growing 39% and a $625 billion backlog indicating sustained growth.
news.Keywords: Nvidia, NVDA, Microsoft, MSFT, Broadcom, AVGO, AI, growth stocks, GPUs, custom chips, Azure

news.Title: Clearbridge Dividend Strategy Trimmed Broadcom (AVGO) Due to Diminishing Risk-Reward Outlook
news.Content: ClearBridge Investments , a global equity manager, recently published first-quarter 2026 commentary for its “Clearbridge Dividend Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here . The market has witnessed two significant developments over the past three months: the war in Iran and the growing displacements of software engineers and the software industry. Amid this context, the strategy outperformed the S&P 500 Index, which ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ClearBridge Dividend Strategy modestly reduced its position in Broadcom (AVGO) due to a diminished risk-reward outlook after its shares tripled in two years.
• The firm exited Oracle and increased its investment in Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM), viewing TSMC as a more resilient play regardless of the semiconductor race outcome.
• Broadcom remains well-positioned but could become less relevant in the future, unlike TSMC which manufactures for all major semiconductor companies.
• Broadcom is a popular stock among hedge funds, with 202 hedge fund portfolios holding the stock at the end of Q4 2025.
• The firm believes certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and less downside risk than Broadcom.
news.Keywords: Broadcom, AVGO, Clearbridge Dividend Strategy, Oracle, Taiwan Semiconductor, TSM, hedge funds, AI stocks, risk-reward, semiconductor race

news.Title: Stock Market News for Apr 8, 2026
news.Content: U.S. stocks ended mixed on Tuesday, as investors remained hopeful that progress in negotiations would be made at the eleventh hour with Iran since President Donald Trump’s deadline for Tehran to open the Strait of Hormuz neared. The Dow finished in the red, while the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq ...
news.AI_Summary:
• U.S. stocks ended mixed on Tuesday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average declining and the S&P 500 and Nasdaq advancing.
• Information technology and utilities stocks were the biggest gainers, while consumer staples stocks were the worst performers.
• Stocks rebounded in the final hour after Pakistan's prime minister brokered a proposal for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz.
• Broadcom, Inc. (AVGO) shares jumped 6.2% after announcing long-term AI deals with Alphabet (GOOGL) and Anthropic.
• Durable goods orders declined 1.4% in February, primarily due to a drop in orders for commercial aircraft.
news.Keywords: Stock market, Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq, Iran ceasefire, Broadcom, AVGO, AI deals, Alphabet, Anthropic, durable goods orders

news.Title: Why FMC Rallied in March, Even As Markets Fell
news.Content: Shares of agricultural chemical producer FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) rallied 16.8% in March, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . FMC entered March having lost significant value, with the stock having declined 72% in 2025. Last year, a crop down-cycle combined with a significant number of FMC products coming off-patent, leading to pricing pressure and lower ...
news.AI_Summary:
• FMC Corporation (FMC) shares rallied 16.8% in March, recovering from a significant decline in 2025 due to a crop down-cycle and patent expirations.
• The war in Iran has created a supply crunch for certain agricultural chemical inputs, benefiting FMC.
• FMC's CEO mentioned that several buyers are considering the company as a potential acquisition target, sparking interest from investment banks.
• The war's impact on the Strait of Hormuz may have tightened the market for agricultural chemicals like urea and ammonia.
• FMC faces risks including $4.1 billion in debt and potential disappointment if earnings don't meet Wall Street's minimal benefit expectations from the supply crunch.
news.Keywords: FMC Corporation, FMC, agricultural chemicals, Iran war, supply crunch, acquisition target, debt, earnings, fertilizer

news.Title: Global Chaos, AI Fears Help Tech’s Dividend Stocks Beat Market
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- An uncertain economy and dangerous geopolitical backdrop have investors buying into technology’s most popular haven trade: dividend-rich telecommunications stocks. After a dismal 2025, telecom is one of this year’s top performing sectors in the S&P 500 Index, rising more than 7% while the broad benchmark is down about 1%. Shares of Verizon Communication Inc. are up 16% in 2026, and AT&T Inc. has gained 10%. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq 100 Index fell into a correction in March, and a Bloomberg gauge of the Magnificent Seven tech giants is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Dividend-rich telecommunications stocks are outperforming the market in 2026, with Verizon (VZ) up 16% and AT&T (T) up 10%.
• Investors are prioritizing predictable cash flows and dividend income amid economic uncertainty and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.
• Tech stocks, including those in the AI trade, have seen rotation into more defensive sectors.
• Telecom companies offer attractive dividend yields (Verizon 5.6%, Comcast 4.8%) and are considered more insulated from the AI build-out race.
• Their infrastructure (fiber-optic cables, cellular towers, data centers) provides staying power, making them part of the HALO trade (high asset, low obsolescence).
news.Keywords: Telecom stocks, dividends, Verizon, AT&T, Comcast, AI, geopolitical risk, defensive sectors, HALO trade, infrastructure

news.Title: Why Constellation Energy Stock Slumped in March
news.Content: Constellation Energy (NASDAQ: CEG) stock is treading on soft ground. It fell 15.3% in March and is down another 4% this month as of this writing, according to data provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence . Important recent updates, including a potential delay in a major project and conservative guidance, took the wind out ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Constellation Energy (CEG) stock fell 15.3% in March and is down another 4% in April due to a potential project delay and conservative guidance.
• The company, the largest U.S. electricity producer and clean energy producer, is positioned to benefit from AI data center power demands.
• The stock surged 58% in 2025 due to its nuclear energy dominance amid the data center boom.
• Constellation's 2026 operating earnings guidance of $11.50 per share missed consensus estimates of $11.78 per share.
• A potential delay in restarting the Three Mile Island reactor (Crane Clean Energy Center) until 2030 could impact its Microsoft (MSFT) data center deal.
news.Keywords: Constellation Energy, CEG, AI, data centers, electricity, nuclear energy, project delay, guidance, Microsoft, MSFT

news.Title: Wall Street Analysts See Silicon Motion (SIMO) as a Buy: Should You Invest?
news.Content: When deciding whether to buy, sell, or hold a stock, investors often rely on analyst recommendations. Media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm-employed (or sell-side) analysts often influence a stock's price, but are they really important? Let's take a look at what these Wall Street heavyweights have to say about Silicon Motion (SIMO) before we discuss the reliability of brokerage recommendations and how to use them to your advantage. Silicon Motion currently has an average ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Silicon Motion (SIMO) has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.27 (approximating Strong Buy to Buy), with 81.8% of recommendations being Strong Buy.
• However, the article cautions against relying solely on ABR due to potential biases in sell-side analyst ratings.
• The Zacks Rank, based on earnings estimate revisions, is presented as a more reliable quantitative tool.
• Brokerage firms often have vested interests, leading to overly optimistic recommendations.
• The article emphasizes using ABR to validate one's own analysis or a proven predictive tool like the Zacks Rank.
news.Keywords: Silicon Motion, SIMO, analyst recommendations, brokerage firms, ABR, Zacks Rank, earnings estimate revisions, stock bias

news.Title: 2 Stocks With Monster Potential to Hold Through the Next Decade of Chaos
news.Content: The next decade will see seismic shifts across many major industries. In particular, both the energy and transportation sectors will be reimagined thanks to rapid advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) technologies . Here are two monster stocks poised to benefit from the transition. 1. Rivian Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) is my favorite growth stock for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Rivian (RIVN) is highlighted as a favorite growth stock for 2026, trading at 3.2 times sales, significantly cheaper than Tesla (TSLA) at over 13 times sales.
• Both Rivian and Tesla are heavily investing in artificial intelligence (AI) for self-driving capabilities and potential robotaxi markets.
• Rivian's expected ramp toward positive gross margins has been pushed out due to rising R&D costs for self-driving technology.
• The robotaxi market is estimated by some experts to be worth over $5 trillion globally.
• Oklo (OKLO), a mini nuclear power plant company, is also positioned to benefit from AI's energy demands, with potential data center customers but is largely pre-revenue.
news.Keywords: Rivian, RIVN, Tesla, TSLA, AI, growth stock, valuation, robotaxi, Oklo, OKLO, nuclear power, energy demand

news.Title: Should You Add a Defense ETF to Your Portfolio in April?
news.Content: The current war in Iran has disrupted the global geopolitical landscape and the outlook for U.S. stocks. It has also sent defense stocks soaring. Over the past year, these three of the biggest aerospace & defense ETFs have outperformed the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF by more than 2x: Will AI create ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The defense sector is seeing increased investment due to geopolitical tensions (Iran war) and the demand for AI-driven defense and cybersecurity.
• Global defense spending is expected to reach approximately $2.6 trillion in 2026, with the U.S. contributing one-third.
• NATO nations have agreed to invest at least 5% of their GDP in defense by 2035, indicating significant future growth for the sector.
• The three major aerospace & defense ETFs (ITA, PPA, XAR) were down at least 13% from their highs, presenting a potential buy-low opportunity.
• Each ETF offers a distinct risk/reward profile: ITA (leaders, liquidity), PPA (broader exposure), and XAR (all-cap, higher risk/reward).
news.Keywords: Defense stocks, aerospace, ETFs, ITA, PPA, XAR, AI, cybersecurity, defense spending, NATO, geopolitical risk

news.Title: An Opening of the Strait of Hormuz Affects More Than Oil
news.Content: The Strait of Hormuz blockade has caused investors, consumers, and businesses to focus on surging oil prices. Oil affects the cost of every product, since land vehicles, ships, and aircraft need it for fuel. Higher shipping costs result in lower profit margins, and many companies try to pass some of these costs on to consumers. Although oil gets headlines, tech investors have also been paying attention to the helium disruption caused by the war. Qatar produces about one-third of helium and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Strait of Hormuz blockade and the Iran war have impacted oil prices and disrupted the helium supply, essential for semiconductor fabrication.
• A decline in helium supply could lead to fewer AI chips, smartphones, and other devices.
• AI chipmakers like Nvidia (NVDA) and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSM), as well as Micron (MU), could be impacted by reduced chip production.
• Fewer chips could also affect revenue for liquid-cooling solutions provider Vertiv (VRT) and demand for AI data centers and their energy needs.
• While the long-term AI thesis remains intact, short-term hurdles exist due to the Iran war, advising investors to monitor the situation but not panic sell.
news.Keywords: Helium, semiconductors, AI chips, Nvidia, NVDA, Micron, MU, TSM, Vertiv, VRT, Iran war, Strait of Hormuz

news.Title: Should You Bet on ANET Stock Amid an Estimate Revision Uptrend?
news.Content: Earnings estimates for Arista Networks, Inc. ANET for 2026 and 2027 have moved up 7% to $3.53 and 6.6% to $4.19, respectively, over the past 60 days. The positive estimate revision depicts bullish sentiments about the stock’s growth potential. Image Source: Zacks Investment Research What is Fueling ANET’s Growth? ANET is gaining healthy momentum as the Arista 2.0 strategy is resonating well with customers. The company surpassed shipments of 150 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arista Networks (ANET) is experiencing estimate revision uptrends, with 2026 and 2027 earnings estimates moving up.
• The Arista 2.0 strategy focuses on investing in core businesses with new AI offerings, emphasizing software-as-a-service, and entering adjacent markets.
• ANET holds a leadership position in 100-gigabit Ethernet switches for data centers and is gaining traction in 200- and 400-gigabit products.
• The company benefits from strong cloud traction and demand for scalable infrastructure, with its unified software stack differentiating it from competitors.
• However, depleting margins due to R&D costs and product redesigns present a challenge.
news.Keywords: Arista Networks, ANET, estimate revisions, AI, networking, data center, cloud, software-as-a-service, margins, competition

news.Title: CoreWeave and Nebius Have Outperformed Every "Magnificent Seven" Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock This Year. Can It Last?
news.Content: The "Magnificent Seven" cohort of stocks hasn't had the greatest run in 2026. These are the year-to-date stock performances for each company: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) : -5% Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) : -6% Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) : -3% Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) : -23% Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) : -8% Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) : -13% Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) : -23% Not a single one of those stocks is in the black for the year, making ...
news.AI_Summary:
• CoreWeave and Nebius have outperformed the "Magnificent Seven" AI stocks in 2026, with Nebius up over 30% and CoreWeave up over 15%.
• These companies compete directly with Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon in the AI cloud computing space, focusing on GPUs.
• Microsoft and Meta Platforms are significant clients, renting AI computing capacity from CoreWeave and Nebius.
• Analysts project substantial revenue growth for Nebius (523% this year, 194% next) and CoreWeave (142% this year, 86% next), though they are prioritizing market share over profits.
news.Keywords: AI cloud computing, GPU, market share, revenue growth, competition

news.Title: Stock-Split Euphoria Is Back, With 5 Vanguard ETFs -- Totaling $724 Billion in Combined Assets -- Taking the Plunge
news.Content: Although artificial intelligence (AI) has been dominating the headlines on Wall Street for years, it's not the only trend that's powered the Dow Jones Industrial Average , S&P 500 , and Nasdaq Composite to new heights. news.AI_Summary:
• Vanguard announced that five of its ETFs, with a combined $724 billion in assets, will undergo forward stock splits on April 20, 2026.
• The ETFs undergoing splits are Vanguard Growth ETF (VUG), Vanguard Mega Cap Growth ETF (MGK), Vanguard S&P 500 Growth ETF (VOOG), Vanguard Mid-Cap ETF (VO), and Vanguard Information Technology ETF (VGT).
• These splits aim to reduce share prices below $100, making them more accessible to retail investors and potentially tightening bid-ask spreads.
• The splits are driven by the ETFs' strong historical performance, particularly the Vanguard Information Technology ETF, which has gained approximately 1,360% since inception.
news.Keywords: ETF, stock split, retail investors, diversification, market accessibility

news.Title: The Case for Ethereum as the Most Useful Cryptocurrency in Existence
news.Content: In many ways, referring to Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) as only a "cryptocurrency" does it a major disservice. Ethereum is much more than that -- it is also a blockchain ecosystem and a global, decentralized computing platform used by both individuals and large organizations. In short, a case can be made for Ethereum as the most useful cryptocurrency in existence. If ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Ethereum is described as a decentralized computing platform and a DeFi powerhouse, accounting for 57% of Total Value Locked (TVL).
• It is widely used for decentralized exchanges, tokenized assets, and stablecoin initiatives by financial institutions.
• The article suggests Ethereum's next frontier is artificial intelligence, with potential for autonomous AI agents to transact on its blockchain.
• Despite its utility, Ethereum is down 30% in 2026, potentially due to concerns about software's value in the age of AI.
news.Keywords: Ethereum, blockchain, DeFi, smart contracts, AI integration

news.Title: Why I'm Buying Growth Stocks While Everyone Else Is Panic-Selling Tech
news.Content: The war with Iran brought about a major shift in the stock market. While energy stocks have (not surprisingly) gotten a boost, there has been a general rotation out of technology and large-cap growth stocks and into value and small-cap stocks. Part of this can be because of fears that a prolonged conflict could eventually lead to a global recession. In these periods, value stocks generally tend to outperform. Will AI create the world's first ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The market has seen a rotation from technology and growth stocks to value and small-cap stocks due to geopolitical turmoil and fears of an AI infrastructure boom peaking.
• Hyperscalers are projected to spend $700 billion on AI infrastructure this year, but concerns exist about sustainability and returns on investment.
• Alphabet's older TPUs remain 100% utilized, and CoreWeave's GPUs are fully booked, indicating continued demand despite rental rate decreases.
• The author is buying tech growth stocks like Alphabet, Amazon, Broadcom, and AMD, citing their strong cloud growth, AI chip advantages, and favorable market trends.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, market rotation, growth stocks, cloud computing, semiconductor trends

news.Title: High Dividends Turn Telecom Stocks Into Market’s New Haven Play
news.Content: (Bloomberg) — An uncertain economy and dangerous geopolitical backdrop have investors buying into technology’s most popular haven trade: dividend-rich telecommunications stocks. After a dismal 2025, telecom is one of this year’s top performing sectors in the S&P 500 Index, rising 9.6% while the broad benchmark is down 3.3%. Shares of Verizon Communication ( VZ ) Inc. are up more than 19% in 2026, and AT&T Inc. ( T ) has gained 13%. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq 100 Index ( ^NDX ) fell into a correction in March, and a Bloomberg gauge of the Magnificent Seven tech giants has tumbled 13% ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Dividend-rich telecommunications stocks are becoming a haven for investors amid economic uncertainty and geopolitical risks.
• The telecom sector is a top performer in the S&P 500 this year (up 9.6%), outperforming the Nasdaq 100 and "Magnificent Seven" tech giants.
• Companies like Verizon (up 19% YTD) and AT&T (up 13% YTD) offer predictable cash flows and above-average dividend yields (Verizon: 5.6%, Comcast: 4.8%).
• This rotation is driven by a preference for defensive sectors and predictable returns over the AI trade, which faces concerns about massive capital expenditures.
news.Keywords: telecom stocks, dividend yield, defensive sector, market rotation, AI investment concerns

news.Title: Is the AI Gold Rush Over? Costco and Walmart Just Delivered a Sobering $163 Billion Warning to Shareholders of Nvidia, Palantir, and Other Red-Hot AI Stocks.
news.Content: Over the past three years, artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have driven overall market gains -- investors, from the smallest retail investor to billionaire hedge fund managers, have piled into these players. And it's very easy to understand why. AI promises to shake up the way many things are done, and in a positive way -- the technology may help companies gain efficiency, develop better products faster, and more. And all of this equals cost savings and revenue growth. So investors rushed to get in on big AI names ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The strong performance of AI stocks like Nvidia and Palantir has been tempered by concerns over high valuations, geopolitical instability, and economic uncertainty.
• Costco and Walmart outperformed Nvidia in the first quarter, indicating a shift towards perceived safer investments, with consumer staples ETFs showing gains.
• Nvidia lost $300 billion in market value in Q1, while Costco and Walmart saw substantial market cap increases.
• Despite the recent market correction, the long-term outlook for the AI market remains robust, with projections of trillions of dollars by 2030.
news.Keywords: AI market, stock performance, valuation, investor sentiment, market correction

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: 中東停火利多! 台股創史上第2大漲點 股王.股后飆漲停
news.Content:
財經中心／唐詩晴、賴文軒 台北報導

受到美伊停火兩週的激勵，市場恐慌情緒瞬間煙消雲散，台北股市終場狂飆1,531點，不僅刷新史上單日第二大漲點，外資更是大手筆回補超過千億元，盤面上41千金並列，股王信驊、股后穎崴帶領12檔千 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 中東停火利多激勵，台股8日狂飆1,531點，創史上單日第二大漲點，外資大手筆回補超過千億元。
• 盤面41千金並列，股王信驊、股后穎崴帶領12檔千金股集體漲停，權王台積電也狂飆90元，收在1,950塊。
• 統一投顧分析師認為，若雙方能正式簽訂退兵協定，台股基本面強勁且AI訂單能見度高，有機會挑戰前波高點。
• 資金集中於市值型ETF及高價股，外資近期開始回流台股，有利高價股及高市值個股獲得買盤。
• 統一投顧總經理提醒，需觀察成交量能是否充足，以及油價與通膨影響，短期慶祝行情後需留意高油價造成的通膨影響。
news.Keywords: 中東停火,台股,漲點,外資,千金股,信驊,穎崴,台積電,AI,資金流向

news.Title: Microsoft Pulled Back. Buying Opportunity or Warning Sign?
news.Content: The knock on Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) stock in 2026 is self-explanatory: Capital expenditures (capex) are ballooning, Azure growth is moving a half-step slower than Wall Street demands, and an uncomfortable portion of the cloud backlog is tied to a single unprofitable partner, OpenAI. The stock has shed roughly a third of its value from all-time highs -- its worst ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft faces concerns regarding ballooning capital expenditures and slower Azure growth.
• A significant portion of the cloud backlog is tied to a single unprofitable partner, OpenAI.
• The stock has shed roughly a third of its value from all-time highs, its worst drawdown since 2008.
• Meta Platforms' AI investments were cheered by Wall Street, unlike Microsoft's infrastructure spending narrative.
• Copilot adoption rates have been slower than initially hyped, but enterprise adoption is growing, with customer seats tripling year-over-year.
news.Keywords: capital expenditures, Azure growth, cloud backlog, AI investment narrative, Copilot adoption

news.Title: 台股還有便宜股票可撿？他曝1投資心法：台灣只會越來越值錢
news.Content:
財經中心／周希雯報導

台股經歷先前連日重挫，隨著美國宣布與伊朗達成「停火2週」的協議，談判曙光令投資人信心大增，台股今（9日）以34761點作收、上漲1531點，創歷史第二大 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股經歷先前連日重挫後，隨著美伊達成停火協議，投資人信心大增，今日收盤上漲1531點，創歷史第二大漲幅。
• 財經網美胡采蘋打破迷思，認為「不會再有便宜的東西了，台灣只會越來越值錢」。
• 台股從2019年後進入大斜率上升軌道，從8000點漲到3萬多點，是因為疫情奇蹟及AI起飛。
• 2019年僅大立光一支千金股，今日首度達成40檔千金股，股王信驊股價已破萬。
• 胡采蘋認為「便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字」，股價高的股票只要一直漲就是便宜股票。
news.Keywords: 台股,股票,便宜,貴,帳面數字,胡采蘋,AI,千金股,信驊,台灣價值

news.Title: Tesla Stock Pulled Back 26.2% After a Monster Run. Is It Time to Buy the Dip?
news.Content: Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) valuation can seem a little confusing. Even after a sharp decline, shares still trade at nearly 14 times sales. Rivian , another EV stock , trades at just over 3 times sales. To be clear, I'm still a big fan of Rivian stock. I think it's clearly undervalued . But that doesn't mean I think Tesla stock is overvalued. In fact, there's reason to believe Tesla could add another $1 trillion to its market cap over the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's valuation is being examined after a 26.2% pullback.
• Full autonomy and robotaxis are identified as key growth areas for Tesla.
• Experts predict large-scale robo-taxi deployment by 2030, with potential for significant market value.
• Cathie Wood believes robotaxis could account for over 90% of Tesla's enterprise value by the decade's end.
• The robotaxi market is estimated to be worth $5 trillion to $10 trillion long-term.
news.Keywords: Tesla valuation, full autonomy, robotaxis, AI investment, market growth

news.Title: The 2 Best Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks to Buy Now. They Could Soar 35% and 50%, According to Wall Street.
news.Content: Year to date, analysts have raised first-quarter earnings estimates across technology stocks more significantly than any other market sector, and upward revisions over the last month have been particularly pronounced in Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) and Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) . Upward revisions to forward earnings estimates are often a catalyst for share price appreciation, but Palantir and Micron have declined modestly in the last month. I ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies and Micron Technology have seen upward earnings estimate revisions.
• Palantir's median target price implies 35% upside, while Micron's implies 50% upside.
• Palantir's Q4 revenue increased 70% to $1.4 billion, with a record Rule of 40 score of 127%.
• Micron reported Q2 fiscal 2026 revenue increase of 196% to $23.8 billion, driven by DRAM and HBM sales.
• Micron's non-GAAP earnings increased 682% to $12.20 per diluted share.
news.Keywords: earnings estimate revisions, AI stocks, revenue growth, EPS growth, price targets

news.Content: 群益投信今（8）舉行2026年第二季投資展望記者會，展望第二季，中東局勢與降息預期變化仍可能帶來波動，不過在全球經濟與企業獲利持續成長的支撐下，市場將進入「關鍵延長賽」。AI依然是台股市場主旋律，資金預期將在AI子產業中 ...

• 群益投信展望第二季，AI仍是台股市場主旋律，資金預期將在AI子產業中輪動，特別是先進封裝、載板、光通訊及測試介面等類股。

• 美系券商上修台積電目標價，看好首季毛利率攀升至66.8%，預估今、明兩年營收年增幅都將超過3成。

• 美系外資升評3081聯亞，看好新增MOCVD設備反映新產能開出，以及InP基板良率改善，推升800G、1.6T高速光通訊營收成長。

news.Title: Prediction: The AI Bubble Is Readying to Pop, With These 4 Factors Tipping Off Investors
news.Content: Roughly 30 years ago, the advent and proliferation of the internet changed corporate America forever. It opened new doors for businesses that didn't previously exist, as well as gave rise to the retail investor revolution by tearing down the information barrier that had existed between Wall Street and Main Street for over a century. For decades, investors have waited, often impatiently, for the next technological leap forward to take shape. Artificial intelligence (AI) has answered that call, and foundational AI stocks, such as Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , have ascended to the heavens. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article predicts a potential AI bubble burst due to four factors.
• Historical parallels are drawn to the dot-com bubble, emphasizing the optimization curve for new technologies.
• AI stock valuations and the broader market are considered historically pricey.
• Waning hardware scarcity is identified as a potential drag on AI superstars.

news.Title: 5 New Risks to Ethereum Just Surfaced. Is The Coin Still a Buy?
news.Content: According to a new paper released by Alphabet 's Google Quantum AI group on March 30, there are five distinct ways that a future quantum computer could attack Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) by breaking its encryption. That certainly sounds alarming. If everything the new research says is true, would the coin still be a buy? Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google Quantum AI group published research on five ways quantum computers could attack Ethereum's encryption.
• The research suggests breaking Ethereum's cryptography could require fewer than 500,000 physical qubits.
• Quantum computers could compromise individual wallets, admin keys, and smart contracts.
• Potential existential risks include consensus attacks on the proof-of-stake system and data availability sampling.
• The Ethereum Foundation is working on migrating to quantum-resistant cryptography, targeting upgrades by 2029.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, Ethereum, encryption, cybersecurity, cryptography migration

news.Title: Nvidia Stock Just Got Hit by a Shift Not Seen in 13 years. Here's What Investors Should Do Next
news.Content: This has been a tough year thus far for Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) . Despite delivering record-breaking results and a stunning forecast, the stock continues to languish and has been treading water for more than eight months. There isn't any one thing holding back the artificial intelligence (AI) chipmaker, but a confluence of events that have kept the stock rangebound. The geopolitical backdrop, persistent inflation, and questions about the future adoption of AI have weighed on Nvidia's stock, and even some seasoned investors are beginning ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's stock has been rangebound for over eight months due to geopolitical backdrop, inflation, and AI adoption questions.
• Hedge funds are selling stocks at the fastest rate in 13 years, impacting major tech names like Nvidia.
• Nvidia delivered record revenue of $68 billion in fiscal 2026 Q4, up 73% year-over-year.
• Adjusted EPS surged 82% to $1.62, with an impressive gross margin of 71.1%.
• The company has visibility into a $500 billion backlog for Blackwell and Vera Rubin AI chips through 2026.
news.Keywords: stock performance, hedge fund activity, revenue growth, EPS growth, AI chip backlog

• 推出aiDAPTIV混合型SSD方案，主打資料安全、降低AI推論成本，獲客戶追加訂單。
news.Keywords: 群聯,潘健成,記憶體,營收,AI,AI代理人,SSD,NAND,CSP,伺服器

news.Title: 【0050加掛不配息有譜1】 網友一面倒支持！ 恐因台積電難產？
news.Content: 近期凱基投信推出被市場稱為「不配息版 0050」的凱基台灣 TOP 50 ETF（00916），引發投資圈對不配息級別的強烈關注。這股熱潮也讓社群紛紛敲碗，希望國內最具指標性的元大台灣 50（0050）與富邦台 50（006208）能 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 凱基投信推出「不配息版0050」凱基台灣TOP50 ETF（009816），引發市場對不配息級別關注。
• 社群紛紛敲碗元大台灣50（0050）與富邦台50（006208）能推出不配息級別，認為「必買爆」。
• 消息指出，ETF加掛級別可能設「單一成分股權重不得超過30%」門檻，0050、006208因台積電權重過高恐被排除。
• 網友認為減少再投入成本和稅務，是長線投資福音，讓投資人自行決定現金流或資產成長。
• 周冠男指出，配息本質是「左手換右手」，且需課徵所得稅，建議投資不應迷信配息。
news.Keywords: ETF,0050,009816,不配息,台積電,權重,配息,長線投資,複利

• 低軌衛星族群強漲昇達科漲逾9%、波若威漲停，啟碁、正文漲逾7%，面板股群創、友達強漲。

news.Title: Prediction: This AI Stock Will Be Worth More Than Microsoft, Alphabet, and Palantir Combined by 2030
news.Content: Finding a stock that will be worth more than Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , and Palantir (NASDAQ: PLTR) combined seems like a far-fetched notion. Right now, these three stocks are worth $6.65 trillion combined. By 2030, this trio could be ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia is projected to be worth more than Microsoft, Alphabet, and Palantir combined by 2030.
• Nvidia's GPUs are critical for AI workloads, driving significant growth since 2023.
• Analysts project 79% growth in Q1 and 85% in Q2, indicating continued AI demand.
• Nvidia anticipates data center capital expenditures to reach $3 trillion to $4 trillion annually by 2030.
• If Nvidia captures a 36% spending share, its revenue could reach $1.44 trillion, implying a $21.6 trillion valuation.
news.Keywords: AI stock prediction, GPU demand, data center spending, revenue projection, valuation forecast

news.Content: 【財訊快報／魏聖峰】在美國總統川普接受巴基斯坦總理的建議暫時接受與伊朗的停火協議，暫停兩週對伊朗的攻擊行動，TACO再度發揮功效，帶動週二美股盤後交易期貨指數大漲、國際油價大跌9%，帶動週三亞洲股市的全面上漲行情。週 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國總統川普接受巴基斯坦建議暫停對伊朗攻擊兩週，帶動週三亞洲股市全面上漲。
• 台股在利多加持下，開高走高並攻克34000點關卡，有直逼35000點企圖心。

news.Title: 去年「187家公司」賺逾1股本！謝金河看好「2產業」
news.Content:
財經中心／李明融報導

美國總統川普（Donald Trump）同意暫停對伊朗進行更激進的軍事行動，停戰時間則為期2週，市場立刻出現談判的曙光，投資人信心大增，台股今（9日）收盤以34761點作收，上漲1531點，寫 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國總統川普同意暫停對伊朗更激進軍事行動兩週，市場出現談判曙光，台股9日收盤上漲1531點，台積電漲90元。
• 財信傳媒董事長謝金河指出，台灣去年賺超過一個股本的公司高達187家，顯示企業獲利能力強勁。
• 去年全體上市櫃公司淨利4.53兆元創歷史紀錄，台積電貢獻1.7178兆元，佔38%。
• 去年EPS超過100元的有4家，台積電EPS 66.26元排第9，聯發科66.16元排第10。
• 謝金河點名記憶體及通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，預期全年淨利上看5.99兆元。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,台積電,謝金河,獲利,EPS,記憶體,通路商,AI

• 股王信驊(5274-TW)強勢攻上漲停，股價來到12615元天價，再度改寫台股新紀錄。

news.Title: 2 Reasons I Wouldn't Buy the SpaceX IPO With Free Money
news.Content: SpaceX is getting ready to go public, and it could be the biggest IPO in history. After the company filed confidentially to go public last week, Bloomberg reported that it's seeking a valuation of up to $2 trillion, though CEO Elon Musk has pushed back on that report. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » SpaceX was valued at $1.25 trillion, based on estimates from the board of directors and investment bankers, in February ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is seeking a valuation of up to $2 trillion for its IPO.
• The company generated $15 billion-$16 billion in revenue in 2025, with $8 billion in EBITDA.
• Based on a $2 trillion valuation, SpaceX's price-to-sales ratio would be approximately 130.
• This valuation is higher than any S&P 500 stock except Palantir, and more than three times higher than most.
• Elon Musk's leadership carries risk due to overpromising and shifting investor attention.
news.Keywords: SpaceX IPO, valuation risk, price-to-sales, Elon Musk risk, market expectations

news.Title: 台股沒有便宜的股票了！胡采蘋揭迷思：便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字
news.Content:
記者李鴻典／台北報導

你有投資股票嗎？財經網美胡采蘋今（8）天表示，便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字。2020年台灣戰勝疫情之後，台灣就大步走上了強 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 財經網美胡采蘋表示，便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字，台灣只會越來越值錢。
• 台股從2019年後進入大斜率上升軌道，破萬後迅速衝破2萬、3萬，今年挑戰4萬。
• 2019年僅大立光一支千金股，今日首度達成40檔千金股，股王信驊股價已破萬。
• 胡采蘋認為，如果還有便宜的股票，是因為大家都漲了，它為什麼沒漲。
• 股價低的股票買了不漲就是貴，股價高的股票一直漲就是便宜股票。
news.Keywords: 台股,股票,便宜,貴,帳面數字,胡采蘋,AI,千金股,信驊,台灣價值

news.Title: 量產專案減少，智原Q1估為今年營運谷底
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-08 11:56:23 黃立安 發佈

ASIC設計服務廠智原(3035)今年第一季營運表現承 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASIC設計服務廠智原今年第一季營運表現承壓，主因量產專案減少，導致單季營收下滑。
• 公司3月營收10.67億元，月增44.72%、年減69.38%；累計第一季營收25.89億元，季減7.8%、年減65%。
• 總經理王國雍坦言，第一季為全年營運谷底。
• 市場關注智原在先進製程合作中的角色與效益，Intel加入Terafab計畫。
• 法人認為，隨著18A平台成熟與生態系擴張，智原可望受惠於先進製程導入門檻提升，強化ASIC設計服務競爭力。

news.Title: 蘋果自研AI晶片Baltra曝光！韓媒：蘋果直接測試玻璃基板 意欲掌控封裝決策權
news.Content: 韓媒《The Elec》周二 (7 日) 報導指出，蘋果正加速自研 AI 硬體，已開始測試先進的玻璃基板，用於 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 韓媒報導，蘋果正加速自研AI硬體，已開始測試先進的玻璃基板，用於代號「Baltra」的AI伺服器晶片。
• Baltra預計採用台積電3奈米N3E製程，並採用chiplet小晶片架構組合。
• 為增強供應鏈掌控，蘋果直接向三星電機評估採購玻璃基板。
• 晶片通信交由博通開發，三星電機負責提供T-glass玻璃基板，最終由台積電生產封裝。
• 蘋果意圖掌控封裝決策權，透過垂直整合策略，逐步內部化關鍵技術。
news.Keywords: 蘋果,AI晶片,Baltra,玻璃基板,台積電,三星電機,博通,封裝,供應鏈,垂直整合

news.Title: 超車0050！「不配息0050」009816爆近30萬張成交巨量奪台股第一
news.Content: 台股今（8）日強勢反彈，ETF同步爆出大量，其中「不配息0050」凱基台灣TOP50（009816）盤中成交量衝上近30萬張 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今日強勢反彈，ETF同步爆出大量，凱基台灣TOP50（009816）盤中成交量衝上近30萬張，奪台股及ETF成交量冠軍。
• 009816主打「股息自動再投入」機制，將股利直接再投資於成分股，不採配息方式，吸引長期投資資金。
• 009816追蹤「臺灣TOP 50指數」，前十大持股以電子權值股為主，台積電權重高達42.2%。
• 法人表示，AI需求持續熱絡，CSP業者積極導入自研ASIC晶片，預計下半年成為另一波成長動能。
• 儘管短期需留意地緣政治與通膨變數，但中長期基本面依然穩健。

news.Title: 187家賺逾1股本！ 謝金河點名「2產業」：獲利會很嚇人
news.Content: 去年台股展現驚人韌性，全體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4.53兆元。雖然台積電以1.7兆元獲利穩坐護國神山，但數據顯示台灣已非「一個人的武林」，去年高達187家公司賺超過一個股本，從AI供應鏈到觀光旅遊業 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 去年台股展現驚人韌性，全體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4.53兆元再創新高，去年EPS突破10元的企業高達187家。
• EPS逾百元有緯穎、大立光、信驊及川湖等4家，謝金河預言，記憶體與通路商首季將繳出爆發性成績單。
• 台積電去年獲利1.7兆元，佔上市櫃公司淨利38%，扮演護國神山角色。
• 謝金河指出，台灣企業獲利能力超強，數字令人驚嘆。
• 預期記憶體及通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，全年淨利上看5.99兆元，將是支撐台股的重要底氣。
news.Keywords: 台股,獲利,EPS,台積電,記憶體,通路商,AI,謝金河

news.Title: 股王信驊大漲1145元攻漲停12615元　再創台股新紀錄
news.Content: （中央社記者鍾榮峰台北2026年04月8日電）信驊 (5274) 3月和第1 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 信驊3月和第1季自結合併營收同創新高，加上美伊停火協議，帶動台股飆漲逾1300點。
• 信驊今天早盤衝上漲停12615元，大漲1145元，超越3月18日高點，再創新天價。

news.Title: 高盛、大摩喊買！ 台積電目標價衝2750元 專家揭「瘋狂上修關鍵」
news.Content: 當川普釋出與伊朗和平協議接近達成的訊號，原油價格回吐，地緣風險暫歇後，市場目光重新聚焦台積電。儘管消費性電子疲軟，高盛與大摩仍因AI需求爆發調升其長期營運展望，產業專家沈萬鈞表示，台積電成長主軸已由AI接手，毛利率與 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 當川普釋出與伊朗和平協議接近達成的訊號，原油價格回吐，地緣風險暫歇後，市場目光重新聚焦台積電。
• 高盛與摩根士丹利因AI需求爆發調升台積電長期營運展望，認為成長主軸已由AI接手，毛利率與資本支出將迎來結構性上揚。
• 儘管消費性電子疲軟，但AI GPU、AI ASIC及傳統伺服器CPU需求強勁，已迅速填補產能缺口。
• 高盛預期下一代AI加速器將推動製程從N5遷移至N3，並進一步往N2推進，先進製程供給到2027年後仍將維持緊張。
• 高盛將台積電12個月目標價上修至2750元並維持買進評等，摩根士丹利維持「加碼」評等，目標價2288元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,AI,毛利率,資本支出,先進製程,高盛,摩根士丹利,目標價,營收,AI加速器

news.Title: 台積電法說會前美系外資調高目標價至2750元，重申「買進」
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】趕在台積電(2330)下週召開法說會前，美系外資在最新出爐的報告中調高目標價，由原先預估的2600元調 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電下週召開法說會前，美系外資最新報告調高目標價至2750元，重申「買進」評等。
• 另一家美系外資重申「加碼」評等，目標價2288元。
• 美系外資看好台積電受惠於人工智慧將帶動多年成長，以及更高的結構性毛利率。
• 預估台積電2026-2027年獲利預估上調約4-6%，主要受惠於AI需求強勁成長及毛利率結構性提高。
• 儘管智慧型手機和消費性電子產品需求疲軟，但AI加速器和AI驅動的伺服器CPU需求強勁，足以抵銷影響。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,外資,目標價,AI,營收,毛利率,先進製程,資本支出

news.Title: 【Yahoo早盤】美伊暫時停火！台股強彈逾千點重返3萬4 分析師丁彥鈞：宜逢高調節
news.Content: 美國與伊朗傳出暫時停火消息，市場避險情緒降溫，國際油價跌破每桶100美元，帶動全球股市回穩，台股今（8）日盤勢反彈，一度上漲1364點，最高 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊傳出暫時停火消息，市場避險情緒降溫，國際油價跌破每桶100美元，台股8日盤勢反彈，一度上漲1364點，最高來到34593點。
• 啟發投顧分析師丁彥鈞表示，此波上漲主要來自外資回補與情緒修復，建議「逢高調節、拉回再布局」。
• 外資已開始由賣轉買，帶動大盤走揚，內資則偏向賣方調節，形成籌碼面轉換。
• 電子股表現最為強勢，因本益比普遍較高，先前恐慌情緒升溫時跌幅較深，市場回穩資金優先回流。
• 金融股因具備較高殖利率保護，近期走勢相對穩定，呈現防禦型資產特性。

財經中心／余國棟報導

受到美股尾盤急拉激勵，加上美國總統川普宣布與伊朗停火兩周，市場風險情緒快速回溫，帶動台股今日開盤呈現跳空大漲格局。台股今（8）日開盤強勢上攻，加權指數大漲1201點至3443 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受到美股尾盤急拉激勵，加上美國總統川普宣布與伊朗停火兩周，市場風險情緒快速回溫，台股今日開盤呈現跳空大漲格局。
• 台股今日開盤強勢上攻，加權指數大漲1201點至34431點，漲幅達3.61%，櫃買指數同步上漲3.71%。
• 台積電大漲75元帶動下，電子權值股全面點火，市場情緒明顯轉向樂觀。

• AI相關族群全面爆發，包括記憶體族群大漲6.57%、電子零組件族群全面爆發，台達電大漲8.58%。

news.Title: 大和喊進南亞科「目標價292」 專家直指關鍵：定價模型徹底改變
news.Content: 大和證券近期將南亞科目標價由245元上調至292元，具多年市場經驗的基金經理人沈萬鈞直指核心關鍵，若獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間的高位，南亞科的定價模型將徹底改變，從傳統循環股轉向戰略資源供應 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 大和證券將南亞科目標價由245元上調至292元，認為獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間高位。
• 南亞科3月合併營收181.70億元，第一季累計營收490.87億元，獲利優於預期。
• 第二季conventional DRAM合約價預估季增58%至63%，主因供應商將產能轉向HBM及伺服器應用。
• AI優化改善單位成本與效率，反而會釋放被壓抑的需求，導致總量擴張。
• 北美CSP正與供應商洽談長約，記憶體已成為AI基礎設施中「不能斷料的戰略資源」。
news.Keywords: 南亞科,大和證券,目標價,DRAM,報價,AI,伺服器,長約,獲利,記憶體

news.Title: The Crowd Is Dumping Iren. Here's Why I'd Be Buying It Down 54%.
news.Content: Not that long ago, Iren (NASDAQ: IREN) enjoyed a monumental bull run, soaring from $5 to $76 in less than a year. That euphoric momentum has been depleted. The stock has crashed by 54% from its all-time high, but the long-term picture is stronger than ever. Here's why Iren looks like a buy ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Iren's stock has crashed 54% from its all-time high, with an at-the-market equity program causing skepticism.
• The company has a $11 billion market cap, and the equity program could dilute shares by half.
• Iren signed a landmark five-year $9.7 billion deal with Microsoft for AI data center capacity.
• The company secured a 1.6 gigawatt site in Oklahoma, boosting its total pipeline to over 4.5 gigawatts.
• Iren entered a purchase agreement for more than 50,000 Nvidia chips, indicating strategic moves.
news.Keywords: stock dilution, AI data center, gigawatt pipeline, Nvidia chip purchase, capital intensive

• 鴻海（2317）早盤來到198元，上漲6元，漲幅3.12%，聯發科（2454）來到1520元，上漲50元，漲幅3.4%。
• 台達電（2308）則來到1625元，上漲110元，漲幅逾7.26%。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,開盤,漲點,成交量,台積電,鴻海,聯發科,台達電,AI

news.Content:
【統一證券】

技術面觀察，週二台股收盤站上所有均線之 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 統一證券技術面觀察，週二台股收盤站上所有均線之上，然成交量大幅萎縮，創今年以來最低量。
• 目前10日線及月線下彎，技術指標KD、RSI向上、MACD綠色柱狀體縮小，整體技術面為區間震盪格局。
• 後續多空仍須留意中東戰事消息面變化。
• 國票證券認為，大盤大漲逾600點，然成交量反而收斂，顯示市場仍在觀望美伊後續談判進展。
• 只要後續朝延長戰線但不全面升級的方向發展，操作上仍可以季線作為支撐，逐步布局。

news.Content:
日期：2026年 4月 8日

※盤勢分析

美以伊同意暫時停火、油價崩跌，台股短線多頭反攻34000

※昨日盤勢

川普對伊朗於4/8停火協議到期前極限施壓，儘管油價維持上漲，但美股在

清明連假期間出現利空鈍化反彈，激勵台股週二反彈上漲 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 統一證券分析，美以伊同意暫時停火，油價崩跌，台股短線多頭反攻34000點。
• 川普對伊朗施壓，美股出現利空鈍化反彈，激勵台股週二反彈上漲，收盤站上所有均線。
• 晶圓代工成熟製程因中國晶合集成及世界先進調漲價格10%，表現強勢，中小型績優電子族群百花齊放。
• 台積電上漲2.76%，鴻海下跌0.52%，聯發科上漲0.34%，廣達上漲1.58%，台達電上漲5.94%。
• 市場關注美伊後續談判進展，預期台股可望延續上漲，但仍須關注中東消息面變化。

news.Title: 【盤前焦點】美股、台指期夜盤翻紅　台股拚續強
news.Content: （中央社記者江明晏台北2026年04月8日電）對伊朗通牒截止前，美國總統川普表示開放荷莫茲海峽換暫停攻擊2週，美股翻紅多收高，國際油價收盤互有漲跌；台指期夜盤震 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 對伊朗通牒截止前，美國總統川普表示開放荷姆茲海峽換暫停攻擊2週，美股翻紅多收高。
• 國際油價收盤互有漲跌，台指期夜盤震盪，終場漲318點，台積電期貨盤後也收紅。
• 投顧認為有助台股表現，市場預期美伊協商仍有空間，不至於有供給中斷的極端風險。
• 然而，最終協議達成前，不確定性仍將使油市維持高波動，持續牽動通膨與利率。
• 市場解讀外交有降溫空間，資金向具備AI催化劑的科技龍頭集中，有助台股表現。
news.Keywords: 盤前焦點,美股,台指期,台股,續強,美伊停火,川普,荷姆茲海峽,油價,台積電,AI

news.Title: 1分鐘讀財經》台積電法說倒數 外資曝6大必考題！這次「回檔」成致富跳板
news.Content: 小編今天（8）日精選5件國內外重要財經大事。全球晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日召開法說會，外資大型研究機構在槍林彈雨中提問上膛，聚焦台積電2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，同 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電16日召開法說會，外資聚焦2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，並把握回檔機會調升目標價。
• 摩根士丹利、花旗環球、摩根大通證券分別將台積電股價預期升至2,288元、2,800元與2,400元。
• 市場最關注AI需求是否持續升溫，以及對台積電營收貢獻是否擴大；先進製程與封裝需求強勁，關注資本支出展望。
• 預期台積電基調將延續正向，對AI加速器需求將展現更樂觀態度，2027～2028年產能擴增將更積極。
• 台積電2奈米製程推進進度、客戶導入情況及其對獲利與接單動能的挹注，亦是法說會重要觀察指標。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,外資,目標價,AI,2奈米,先進製程,封裝,資本支出,營收

news.Title: 創意3月營收月增15%；Q1寫次高/年增達63%
news.AI_Summary:
• 創意3月合併營收38.60億元，月增15%、年增33%，創同期新高。
• 第一季合併營收114.48億元，季減7.68%、年增63%，創單季歷史次高。
• 公司拿下Google CPU大單，下一代CPU訂單也順利到手，今年CPU產能比去年更多。
• AI晶片進入量產階段帶動出貨快速攀升，量產業務今年有望延續去年強勁成長力道。
• ADAS業務中國、歐洲客戶已開始量產，北美客戶專案也在進行中，對今明兩年展望樂觀。
news.Keywords: 創意,營收,Google,CPU,AI晶片,量產,ADAS,台積電,NRE

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Isn't Over -- It Just Moved. 5 Growth Stocks Riding the Next Wave.
news.Content: Despite the stock market's rotation out of tech stocks this year, the artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle is far from over. However, it has shifted, which is going to benefit a new basket of AI stocks . The AI infrastructure boom started with the need for raw computing power to train large language models (LLMs). This was a race that helped line the pockets of Nvidia with massive ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI supercycle is shifting towards networking, inference, and agentic AI.
• Broadcom is a leader in Ethernet switches and data center networking components.
• Broadcom is also a leader in ASIC technology for the inference market.
• Alphabet is partnering with Broadcom on advanced AI ASICs (TPUs), offering a 44% lower total cost of ownership than Nvidia servers.
• Arista Networks provides networking platforms and benefits from growing AI chip clusters.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle, networking, inference, ASIC technology, data center infrastructure

news.Title: Why Arista Networks Stock Crushed it on Tuesday
news.Content: An analyst move was the main catalyst behind Arista Networks ' (NYSE: ANET) substantial stock price jump on Tuesday. The tech networking equipment specialist's equity, which has done ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arista Networks' stock rose nearly 6% following a buy upgrade from Rosenblatt with a $180 price target.
• The analyst cited Arista's competitiveness in AI infrastructure due to its extra-dense pluggable optics (XPO) strategy.
• Arista's approach is expected to maintain business with clients like Microsoft and Meta Platforms.
• The company has potential to grow annual revenue by nearly 40% this year and next, exceeding management guidance.
• The AI build-out continues at a rapid pace, benefiting AI infrastructure stock providers.
news.Keywords: stock upgrade, AI infrastructure, optical modules, revenue growth, AI hyperscalers

news.Title: 上週外資在集中市場賣超1601.27億元，賣超台積電最多

news.Title: Apple encounters serious problems with foldable iPhone
news.Content: Apple's long-anticipated entry into the foldable smartphone market has run into trouble before the product ever reached a store shelf. The company has experienced setbacks in the engineering test phase of its first foldable iPhone that could delay mass production and its planned shipment schedule, Nikkei Asia reported on April 6, citing multiple sources briefed on the matter. Reuters, which also carried the story, said it could not independently verify the report. Apple did not respond to TheStreet's request for comment. Apple shares ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's foldable iPhone entry faces engineering test phase setbacks, potentially delaying mass production and shipment.
• Nikkei Asia reported that April is a critical stage for engineering verification, with potential delays extending by months.
• Apple planned to launch 7 to 8 million foldable units, less than 10% of total 2026 iPhone production.
• Engineering challenges include hinge reliability, display durability, and component integration into a thin form factor.
• A delay could impact Apple's marketing strategy and give rivals like Samsung more time to capture market share.
news.Keywords: foldable iPhone, engineering challenges, production delay, supply chain, market competition

news.Title: Why ASML Stock Is Down Today
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . ASML ( NASDAQ:ASML ) declined about 4% on Tuesday following the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASML shares declined about 4% following the introduction of the MATCH Act in the U.S. House.
• The bill aims to align export controls on semiconductor manufacturing equipment among U.S. allies.
• Citi Research analysts suggest the move could hurt ASML by restricting sales of immersion lithography tools to China.
• China's ability to expand chip production lines could be limited without these tools.
• ASML derived about 29% of its revenue from China in 2025, and Beijing might retaliate using rare earth minerals.
news.Keywords: export controls, semiconductor equipment, China sales, lithography tools, trade policy

Growth initiatives include owned-brand and authentication plays — Handmade by Robots (targeting a potential ~$100M ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: Phoenix Education Partners Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Phoenix reported Q2 net revenue of $222.5 million (down 0.4%) with average degreed enrollment up 1.8% to ~82,600; adjusted EBITDA rose 7.8% to $34.8 million and margin expanded to 15.7%, while net income fell to $10.8 million primarily from higher share‑based compensation after the IPO. Management pointed to retention as a key driver — the most recent annual cohort retention reached 76.6% (up ~500 bps year‑over‑year) aided by a digital‑first platform and AI tools — and employer‑affiliated enrollment grew to 35% of total, with over 1 million digital skill badges issued. Executives said Google’s AI -driven search changes ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Phoenix Education Partners reported Q2 net revenue of $222.5 million (down 0.4%) with average degreed enrollment up 1.8%.
• Adjusted EBITDA rose 7.8% to $34.8 million, and margin expanded to 15.7%.
• Net income fell to $10.8 million primarily due to higher share-based compensation post-IPO.
• Annual cohort retention reached 76.6% (up ~500 bps YoY), aided by a digital-first platform and AI tools.
• Google's AI-driven search changes disrupted the marketing funnel, but trends normalized in early March.
news.Keywords: revenue decline, enrollment growth, EBITDA margin, student retention, AI marketing impact

news.Title: Intel Is Teaming Up with SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI: Is This a Game Changer?
news.Content: Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) revealed today that it's coming on board as a major partner in Elon Musk's Terafab chip-manufacturing project. The Terafab has been championed as a massive chip-production facility that will produce chips used by SpaceX, Tesla , and xAI. Right now, the team-up looks to be a significant win for Intel and a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel is joining Elon Musk's Terafab chip-manufacturing project, a significant win for Intel's foundry business.
• The Terafab project aims to produce chips for SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI, with Intel leading key aspects of fabrication.
• The project is expected to cost roughly $25 billion and aims to produce 1 terawatt of compute per year.
• Intel's involvement increases the likelihood of the project's success in producing high-quality chips.
• This partnership could be a catalyst for Intel's foundry business, which has faced challenges against TSMC.
news.Keywords: Terafab project, chip manufacturing, Intel foundry, AI hardware, semiconductor supply chain

news.Title: Nvidia's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Chips Still Need Memory. Here's Why the Micron Sell-Off Has Gone Too Far.
news.Content: In late March, Alphabet unveiled a new software product called TurboQuant. At a high level, TurboQuant dramatically compresses memory footprints in large language models during inference . It didn't take long for headlines to circulate and cause shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) to plunge. In large part, the sell-off was tied to Micron's relationship with Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) since its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) solutions help power Nvidia's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's TurboQuant software compresses memory footprints in large language models, causing a sell-off in memory stocks like Micron.
• Nvidia's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) solutions power its GPUs, making Micron a key supplier.
• The article argues that TurboQuant does not eliminate the need for Micron's memory solutions.
• Nvidia's latest chip architectures (Blackwell, Vera Rubin) are designed with larger HBM stacks.
• Nvidia cannot easily switch suppliers due to extensive testing and integration requirements.
news.Keywords: TurboQuant, memory demand, HBM, GPU integration, supply chain risk

news.Title: 台股下跌你不要怕！法人丟出災難投資法　它把握撿鑽石機會
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

2026年第一季末，台股遭受「外部地緣政治」與「內部清明連假」雙重干擾，受伊朗與以色列軍事緊張影響，避險情緒推升油金價格，美股科技股承壓，導致台股同步回檔 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股遭受「外部地緣政治」與「內部清明連假」雙重干擾後，受伊朗與以色列軍事緊張影響，避險情緒推升油金價格，美股科技股承壓，導致台股同步回檔。
• 操作上需嚴防非理性拋售，國泰金控總經理李長庚提出「災難投資法」，認為戰爭持續時可視為進場機會點。
• 主動國泰動能高息ETF（00400A）經理人梁恩溢表示，市場恐慌帶來的股價回檔，對剛握有充足現金的主動式基金而言，是「彎腰撿鑽石」的布局良機。
• 00400A具備「成長攻擊、收益防守」雙主流配置策略，並搭配月配息機制，成分股中的「高息股」可扮演關鍵緩衝角色。
• 建議分批佈局，逢回優先聚焦具備高護城河、高毛利與高現金流的AI業績成長股。
news.Keywords: 台股,地緣政治,油價,美股,科技股,國泰金,災難投資法,00400A,ETF,AI,高息股,護城河

• 智原因量產專案減少，營收較去年同期減少近7成，凸顯ASIC產業波動特性。
• 創意3月合併營收38.60億元，月增15.16％、年增33.48％，創同期最佳；第一季合併營收114.48億元，年增62.99%。

• 法人看好智原在先進製程與高效能運算領域的布局，可望受惠於18A平台成熟與生態系擴張。
news.Keywords: ASIC,創意,智原,巨有,營收,AI,台積電,CoWoS,CSP,先進製程

news.Title: 南亞科Q1獲利唱旺 外資青睞
news.Content: 記憶體一哥南亞科（2408）望到外資春風。大和資本證券指出，隨DRAM報價走揚，南亞科第一季獲利將超越預期，DDR4今年全年需求都極為強勁，將 ...

• 記憶體一哥南亞科（2408）獲外資青睞，大和資本證券上調目標價至292元，維持「買進」評等。
• 認為獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間高位，南亞科定價模型將徹底改變，轉向戰略資源供應者。
• 第二季conventional DRAM合約價預估季增58%至63%，主因供應商將產能轉向HBM及伺服器應用。
• AI優化改善單位成本與效率，反而會釋放被壓抑的需求，導致總量擴張。
• 南亞科已與包含SanDisk、Solidigm在內多家客戶簽署多年期DRAM長約，合約總額約達25億美元。
news.Keywords: 南亞科,外資,目標價,DRAM,報價,AI,伺服器,長約,獲利,記憶體

news.AI_Summary:

• 加權指數7日跳空開高走高，大漲657點收33,229點，收復33K並站回月線及所有均線。

• 法人對台股中長線看法樂觀，期待見到黑暗後露黎明曙光。
news.Keywords: 台股,台積電,月線,美伊停火,油價,通膨,財報,法說會,AI,籌碼

news.Title: 台股基本面佳 主動式ETF吃香
news.Content: 美國總統川普指美軍預計在2周～3周內撤離伊朗，市場預期戰事即將結束，一度帶動台股ETF飆翻天，截至4月1日收盤績效前十 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 不畏戰事擾局，台股ETF人氣續旺，受益人數上周增加17.1萬人，總人數達1,423.48萬人，連續十周創新高。
• 今年來ETF受益人增加突破200萬人，主動式與高息型ETF各有三檔受益人創新高。
• 群益科技創新ETF經理人陳朝政看好AI核心供應鏈，如晶圓代工、先進封測、水冷散熱及高速光傳輸族群。

news.Title: 台股強勢登月 重返33K
news.Content: 台股清明連假後首日交易，戰事紛擾暫擺一邊。台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤直接跳空至1,850元大漲40元，終場收在1,850元勁揚50元，權值股台達電等齊助攻，加權指數 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股清明連假後首日交易，台積電強勢回歸月線，開盤跳空至1,850元大漲40元。
• 加權指數7日跳空開高走高，大漲657點收33,229點，收復33K並站回月線及所有均線。
• 凱基投顧、群益投顧認為，台股需觀察美伊停火談判明朗，若能重啟運輸，可避免油價續漲、通膨疑慮。
• 基本面利多齊發，包括去年獲利股息雙創高、台積電法說會可望釋利多、美國科技股財報上修可期。
• 法人對台股中長線看法樂觀，期待見到黑暗後露黎明曙光。

news.Title: 權證市場焦點－台積電 急單需求增
news.Content: 隨晶圓代工龍頭台積電（2330）16日法說會即將召開，市場提前押寶買盤也 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 隨晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日法說會召開，市場提前押寶買盤踴躍，台積電股價7日領軍大漲2.76%，終場收1,860元。
• 法人分析，台積電2奈米製程報價將突破3萬美元，AI需求急迫，訂單能見度至2028年。
• 預估台積電第一季毛利率有望攀升至66.8%，反映N3產能緊張、先進製程利用率高及急單需求增加。
• 預期今年及2027年營收年增幅都將超過3成，N3營收今年成長至2倍，占總體營收30%以上。
• 上修今年及2027年每股稅後純益預估值至95.5元及120.4元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,晶圓代工,2奈米,AI,毛利率,N3,營收,EPS,先進製程

news.Title: 台積法說下周登場 外資揭六大必考題

• 摩根士丹利、花旗環球、摩根大通證券分別將台積電股價預期升至2,288元、2,800元與2,400元。
• 市場最關注AI需求是否持續升溫，以及對台積電營收貢獻是否擴大；先進製程與封裝需求強勁，關注資本支出展望。
• 摩根大通預期台積電法說會基調將延續正向，對AI加速器需求將展現更樂觀態度，2027～2028年產能擴增將更積極。
• 摩根士丹利認為，台積電2027、2028年資本支出上看650與700億美元，產能擴張將確保領導地位。

news.Title: Why Shares of Car-Rental Outfit Avis Are Driving Higher Today

You just can't count on this rally continuing much longer than it already has enough to dive into it now. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Avis Budget Group (CAR) shares are up 150% from their mid-March low, reaching a new 52-week high.
• The stock is considered a short-squeeze candidate, with 23% of outstanding shares and 48% of float sold short.

news.Title: Dimon Says AI Capital Spending Will Hit $725 Billion in 2026. Here Are the Sectors That Will Win and the Ones That Will Be Left Behind
news.Content: The artificial intelligence ( AI ) market has expanded rapidly over the past decade, driven by the arrival of more sophisticated generative AI applications, chatbots, and services. That expansion drove many AI stocks to all-time highs. Still, some of those market darlings fizzled out this year as inflation, geopolitical conflicts, and other macro headwinds pushed investors toward more conservative investments. But over the long term, the AI market ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Hyperscalers like Microsoft, Amazon, and Alphabet will increase annual AI-driven capital spending from $450 billion (2025) to $725 billion (2026).
• The biggest beneficiaries are AI infrastructure stocks, including data center REITs like Equinix and Digital Realty.
• Leading AI chipmakers like Nvidia and Broadcom, and foundries like TSMC, will also profit.
• Companies supplying optical equipment, such as Lumentum and Corning, will benefit from data center connection upgrades.
• Older and smaller software companies like Salesforce and ServiceNow may struggle against newer AI challengers.
news.Keywords: AI capital spending, data center REITs, AI infrastructure, chipmakers, software competition

news.Title: Why Intel Stock Is Gaining Today
news.Content: Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) stock is moving higher Tuesday despite bearish pressures for the broader market. The semiconductor company's share price was up 2.2% as of 3:15 p.m. ET. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 had fallen 0.7%, and the Nasdaq Composite was off 1%. The stock had been up as much as 4.9% earlier in the day. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel stock is up 2.2% despite broader market declines, driven by a new partnership with SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI.
• Intel will join Elon Musk's Terafab project to advance chip fabrication for AI and robotics.
• The partnership is a significant win for Intel's turnaround efforts and its manufacturing business.
• Terafab aims to produce advanced chip designs and up to a terawatt of compute power annually.
• The collaboration could be a substantial boost for Intel's foundry services, facing competition from TSMC.
news.Keywords: Intel stock, Terafab project, AI partnership, semiconductor manufacturing, foundry services

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Just Entered Phase 2. Most Investors Aren't Ready.
news.Content: The first phase of the artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle was all about chips. It didn't take long for the whole market to catch on when Nvidia became a household name and data center stocks surged to crazy valuations. That trade happened in broad daylight. Phase 2 is quieter. It's happening in server rooms you'll never visit, in underground fiber conduits across rural Illinois, and in the test labs that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI supercycle is entering Phase 2, focusing on networking, inference, and agentic AI.
• Keysight Technologies reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of $1.6 billion (up 23% YoY) and record orders of $1.65 billion.
• Wireline revenue surpassed wireless revenue, driven by demand for 800G and 1.6T optical transceiver validation.
• Keysight's full-year revenue growth is guided 'just above 20%', with software and services accounting for 40% of revenue.
• Calix builds an AI cloud and appliance-based platform for rural broadband providers, benefiting from federal BEAD program funding.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle phase 2, optical networking, AI infrastructure, broadband deployment, rural connectivity

news.Title: Billionaires Are Loading Up on This Genius Stock That's Up by More Than 212,600% Since Its IPO
news.Content: Billionaire investors were active in the past quarter, buying shares of a stock that's up an incredible amount since it went public. This stock has returned more than 200,000% since its initial public offering, turning every $10,000 invested into a jaw-dropping $21.3 million. However, this mystery stock has been doing this for a long time, so you would have had to buy early and hold on for 29 years to get this return. The stock? Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) . Although the tech giant ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Amazon Web Services (AWS), its cloud computing platform, is the primary growth driver and gateway to the AI sector.
• AWS is experiencing triple-digit percentage growth in its custom AI chips, potentially due to lower costs than GPUs.
• Amazon trades at a fair valuation of 27 times forward earnings, considered a reasonable price for its market position.

news.Title: Goldman has very good news for beaten-down Microsoft investors
news.Content: If you own Microsoft, this year has tested your patience in ways that probably feel unfair. While Nvidia and some of the other tech giants kept grabbing the AI headlines, Microsoft quietly became the worst performer in the Magnificent Seven this year, dropping about 23% in the quarter ending March 31 and badly trailing the S&P 500 That slide came even as you kept hearing that Microsoft was the best positioned AI winner, which only makes the drawdown sting more. Goldman Sachs is now stepping in to say your pain may have gone too far. Goldman has reiterated a buy ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Goldman Sachs reiterated a buy rating on Microsoft (MSFT) with a $600 price target, implying nearly 61% upside.
• Microsoft's AI story is intact, and risks are considered 'already more than priced in'.
• Microsoft's pace of multiple compression has slowed, with improving data points as AI premium tiers gain adoption.
• Goldman believes AI disintermediation risk is over-accounted for, despite Copilot lagging some competitors.
• Microsoft is described as 'the best compounder in our coverage across AI product cycles'.
news.Keywords: Microsoft stock, Goldman Sachs rating, AI upside, Copilot adoption, stock target

news.Title: If You Buy Comfort Systems USA Stock Right Now, Could It Make You a Millionaire?
news.Content: Although the S&P 500 and many stocks are down so far this year, Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) has been a notable exception. Shares are up by more than 54% year to date through April 6 as the HVAC company continues to function as a critical pick-and-shovel play for artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure. The chips that power AI software require cool temperatures, and that's where Comfort Systems USA comes into play, though it's not exclusively an AI stock ...
news.AI_Summary:

• The company has an 'unprecedented demand' leading to a record backlog of almost $12 billion, double since the start of the year.

news.Title: Apple’s Foldable iPhone Remains on Track for September Debut
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Apple Inc.’s first foldable phone is on track to arrive during the company’s normal iPhone launch period later this year, people with knowledge of the matter said, rebutting concerns about major manufacturing snags. The company is scheduled to introduce the foldable model in September alongside the iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max, said the people, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's first foldable phone is on track for a September launch alongside the iPhone 18 Pro models.
• Reports of manufacturing snags were rebutted, with initial supply potentially limited for several weeks.
• Apple aims to compete with Samsung and Chinese smartphone makers in the foldable market.
• The foldable iPhone will feature a wider display orientation and updated iOS for better app compatibility.
• The device is expected to be priced over $2,000, potentially boosting Apple's average sales price.

news.Title: As AMD AI narrative changes, here's what comes next
news.Content: AMD ’s (AMD) AI story is starting to shift. The company is no longer just a beneficiary of rising AI demand. It is now generating meaningful revenue and profit from its data-center business, giving investors a more tangible earnings base today. That changes the setup for the stock. The next phase of upside depends less on broad AI momentum and more on whether AMD can expand its role within customers and capture more system-level revenue as new products roll out. MI450 and Helios mark key inflection point AMD’s next major upside now hinges on a specific product window. Management has ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD's AI narrative is shifting from a potential beneficiary to generating meaningful revenue and profit from its data-center business.
• MI450 and Helios platforms are key inflection points starting in H2 2026, enabling AMD to capture more system-level revenue.
• AMD's Instinct accelerators are in production at eight of the top 10 AI companies, indicating broad adoption.
• Supply constraints are easing with an expanded Samsung HBM4 partnership, improving readiness for AI demand.
• Data Center revenue reached a record $5.4 billion in Q4 2025, creating a more tangible earnings base for the stock.
news.Keywords: AMD AI, data center business, inflection points, supply chain, earnings power

news.Title: Prediction: This Growth Stock Will Be the AI Supercycle's Biggest Winner -- and It's Not a Household Name
news.Content: There is no denying that we are in the middle of an artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle, characterized by persistently strong demand for products and/or services that typically exceeds supply. From hardware to software, companies across different AI niches are struggling to meet end-market demand. Nvidia , for instance, is looking at a whopping $1 trillion in sales ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASML (ASML) is identified as a potential biggest winner of the AI supercycle due to its essential role in advanced chip manufacturing.
• ASML is the sole manufacturer of extreme ultraviolet (EUV) lithography machines, critical for advanced chips.
• The company received 28 billion euros worth of bookings last year, up from 19 billion euros in 2024.
• Foundry giants like TSMC and memory manufacturers like Micron are increasing capital expenditures, likely boosting ASML's orders.
• ASML's next-generation EUV tools carry a $400 million price tag, double the cost of earlier machines.
news.Keywords: ASML, AI supercycle, EUV lithography, chip manufacturing equipment, bookings growth

news.Title: Why Alibaba Stock Plummeted by Almost 13% Last Month
news.Content: Massive Chinese tech company Alibaba (NYSE: BABA) was looking rather diminished on the U.S. stock market in March. Investors weren't cheered by a report that the U.S. government might impose limits on crucial artificial intelligence (AI) technology to Chinese companies, nor were they satisfied with ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alibaba's (BABA) stock fell nearly 13% in March due to potential U.S. limits on AI chip exports to China.
• The company's fiscal Q3 2026 results showed revenue up 2% year-over-year, but non-GAAP net income fell 67%.
• Alibaba missed analyst estimates for both revenue and net income.
• Profitability decline was attributed to aggressive spending in 'quick commerce' and AI infrastructure.
• The article suggests investors consider Alibaba's commitment to fast e-commerce and AI, or look at other tech stocks.
news.Keywords: Alibaba stock, AI chip export limits, earnings miss, quick commerce, AI infrastructure spending

news.Title: Broadcom Inks Major AI Chip Deals With Google and Anthropic
news.Content: The rise of artificial intelligence (AI) has sparked a data center boom needed to support the technology. While graphics processing units (GPUs) supported the first wave of AI adoption, power consumption has become an important consideration, prompting some operators to seek energy-saving alternatives. Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) has profited from this trend, as ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) signed major agreements with Google and Anthropic for next-generation AI processors.
• The deals involve designing and producing Google's Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) and providing networking components.
• Anthropic will gain access to 3.5 gigawatts of TPU-based compute capacity starting in 2027.
• Broadcom's ASIC demand has surged as data center operators focus on energy savings.
• CEO Hock Tan expects AI revenue from chips to exceed $100 billion in 2027.
news.Keywords: Broadcom deals, AI chips, TPUs, data center efficiency, ASIC demand

news.Title: 3 Reasons This Warren Buffett Favorite AI Stock Could Soar Over the Next 10 Years
news.Content: Calling Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) an artificial intelligence stock may have sounded like a stretch not long ago. But I think that view is getting outdated. Yes, Apple is not spending massive sums like Amazon , Alphabet , or Meta Platforms to build out significant AI infrastructure. And yes, it is taking a more measured approach than many investors expected. But that may actually be part of what makes the stock compelling today. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple (AAPL) is considered a compelling AI stock due to its strong financial results and measured approach to AI.
• Warren Buffett remains constructive on Apple, its largest disclosed equity holding.
• Apple's Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue rose 16% year-over-year to $143.8 billion, with iPhone revenue surging 23%.
• Earnings per share rose 19% year-over-year to $2.84, outpacing revenue growth.
• Apple could become the preferred consumer distribution layer for AI, leveraging its ecosystem and devices.

news.Title: Cathie Wood Goes Bargain Hunting: 2 Stocks She Just Bought
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and Kodiak AI (NASDAQ: KDK) are on the cutting edge of autonomous driving, but they have something else in common this week. They were the only two stocks that Cathie Wood's Ark Invest bought across all of its exchange-traded funds (ETFs) on Monday. Wood is a fan of futuristic trends, especially those that are rising in real time. As the co-founder, CEO, and primary stock picker at Ark Invest, she watches over an empire of aggressive growth funds. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cathie Wood's Ark Invest has bought Tesla (TSLA) and Kodiak AI, with Tesla being its largest holding.
• Tesla's revenue declined 3% last year, marking its first top-line dip in two decades, and production of Model S and X has ceased.
• Analysts forecast Tesla's revenue to increase by 9% this year, accelerating to 17% in 2027, with anticipated stronger earnings growth.
• The company's energy generation and storage segment saw a 25% revenue increase, and its services segment exhibits double-digit growth, with future prospects in Cybercab and Optimus robots.
news.Keywords: autonomous driving, EV market, revenue growth, investment strategy, future technology

news.Title: Tesla dodges more headaches as autonomous driving scores a win
news.Content: Tesla scored a rare victory with the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) on Monday after the Office of Defects and Investigations decided to close its investigation into its Actually Smart Summon tech, which allows drivers to summon their parked vehicles to them using just their phones. The ODI opened an investigation into multiple reported crashes on January 6, 2025, and, after analyzing complaint data provided by Tesla and consumer complaints, the agency concluded that, since most of the reported crashes involved minor property damage and no serious injuries, it was ending its inquiry. More Tesla Tesla loses crucial ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's 'Actually Smart Summon' feature has had its NHTSA investigation closed due to minor property damage and no serious injuries reported.
• The NHTSA analyzed consumer complaints and Tesla's data, concluding the inquiry after over a year.
• Despite this win, NHTSA is conducting an 'engineering analysis' into Tesla's Full Self-Driving (Supervised) technology.
• The investigation closure highlights the low incident rate of Smart Summon, with less than 0.1% of millions of sessions resulting in adverse events.
news.Keywords: autonomous driving, regulatory investigation, safety, software update, vehicle technology

news.Title: Tesla's Business Has Become Much More Diversified in Just the Past Five Years. Does That Make Its Stock a Better Buy Today?
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is known for its electric vehicles (EVs), and while they are still its bread and butter, the company has been evolving and diversifying its operations over the years. That can make it less susceptible to market conditions and growing competition. Here's a look at how much more diversified Tesla's business has become in recent years, and whether that could make it a better growth stock to own in the long run. Will AI create ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's business has diversified, with non-automotive revenue accounting for over 27% of its $94.8 billion total revenue in 2025.
• Automotive revenue declined by 10%, while services grew 19% and energy generation/storage increased sales by 27%.
• Despite diversification, Tesla's gross profit margin fell to 18% from 25% in 2021.
• The stock remains expensive with a P/E ratio of over 300 times earnings.
• Intensifying competition in the EV market and low margins make it difficult to justify the high valuation.
news.Keywords: business diversification, non-automotive revenue, gross margin, valuation, EV market, competition

news.Title: The AI Supercycle's Biggest Blind Spot: Why Cybersecurity Growth Stocks Could Outperform in 2026
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have been driving the stock market's action over the course of the three-year bull market that began in late 2022. AI stocks like Nvidia , Broadcom , Micron , and Palantir , to name a few, have put up astronomical returns. But there is one area of the tech sector that has not seen a major boost from the AI supercycle -- at least, not yet: cybersecurity. However, some notable Wall ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cybersecurity stocks have lagged other AI stocks despite the AI supercycle, but analysts forecast a breakout in 2026.
• Global cybersecurity spending is projected to reach $240 billion in 2026 and $320 billion by 2029, with AI-related cybersecurity growing 3-4 times faster.
• JPMorgan Chase attributes increased spending to geopolitical tensions and the need to protect AI infrastructure investments.
• Cybersecurity stocks like CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks, and Cloudflare have seen recent gains.
• Analysts believe AI will be a major tailwind for cybersecurity as protection needs expand.
news.Keywords: cybersecurity stocks, AI supercycle, cybersecurity spending, geopolitical tensions, AI infrastructure protection, sector breakout

news.Title: Intel to join Musk's Terafab mega AI chip project
news.Content: April 7 (Reuters) - Intel said on Tuesday it would join Elon Musk's ‌Terafab AI chip complex project along ‌with ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel will join Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip complex project, alongside SpaceX and Tesla.
• The project involves building two advanced chip factories in Austin, Texas, one for cars/robots and one for AI data centers in space.
• Intel's ability to design, fabricate, and package high-performance chips at scale will accelerate Terafab's goal of producing 1 terawatt per year of compute.
• Intel shares were up about 2% in early trading and have risen around 38% year-to-date.
• The Terafab project aims to power future advances in AI and robotics.
news.Keywords: AI chip complex, Terafab project, Elon Musk, Intel, SpaceX, Tesla, chip factories, AI compute
