news.Title: Billionaire Warren Buffett Says He Sold His Favorite Stock "Too Soon." Should Investors Back Up the Truck?
news.Content: Very few investors can boast the returns that Warren Buffett and his company Berkshire Hathaway have generated over six decades. That's why, when Buffett speaks, investors listen, even though the Oracle of Omaha is now 95 years old and no longer the CEO of Berkshire. In a recent interview with CNBC, Buffett said he sold one of his favorite stocks "too soon." Should investors back ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett stated he sold his Apple stake 'too soon' but remains happy with it as Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding (23% at end of 2025).
• Berkshire Hathaway's new CEO, Greg Abel, indicated limited activity in the Apple position moving forward.
• Buffett praised Apple CEO Tim Cook's performance.
• Apple has a lower capital expenditure ($14 billion) compared to hyperscalers ($700 billion) due to its 'AI as a commodity' bet.
• The new MacBook Neo, priced at $599, sold out quickly and could unlock a $32 billion TAM in 2026, potentially adding $0.03 to EPS.
news.Keywords: Apple stake, Berkshire Hathaway, capital expenditure, MacBook Neo, TAM, EPS, AI strategy

• TSX futures pointed lower as investors braced for a U.S. deadline for Iran regarding the Strait of Hormuz.
• Spot gold and Brent crude futures showed marginal gains, with oil hovering around $110 a barrel.
• U.S. stock market futures were mixed, with Dow futures unchanged, S&P 500 futures down 0.1%, and Nasdaq 100 futures down 0.2%.
• The U.S. services sector expanded at a slower rate in March, with employment contracting and prices paid spiking.
• Broadcom shares rose in premarket trading after signing a long-term agreement with Google for custom AI processors.

news.Title: Why Did Bloom Energy Stock Crash in March?
news.Content: Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE) shares have soared over 700% in the past year, with investors predicting that artificial intelligence (AI) data center growth will continue to accelerate its fuel cell business. The stock may have jumped too far, too fast, though. Some investors have begun questioning the high level ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Bloom Energy (BE) shares sank 13% in March after soaring over 700% in the past year.
• Investors are questioning the high optimism surrounding the company's fuel cell business driven by AI data center growth.
• The stock's valuation is considered high, trading at a price-to-sales ratio of about 11.5 even at the high end of revenue guidance.
• Capacity constraints may limit short-term sales, although the company claims it can expand capacity quickly.
• Short interest in Bloom Energy jumped in mid-March, representing about 10% of the public float.
news.Keywords: fuel cell business, AI data centers, stock valuation, capacity constraints, short interest, revenue guidance

news.Title: TTD Stock Looks Cheap: Should Investors Hold or Exit Now?
news.Content: The Trade Desk TTD, a prominent name in the digital ad tech space, is trading at a massive discount with the forward 12-month price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of 10.29X compared with the Zacks Internet Services industry’s 24.21X. This is also below the Computer and Technology sector’s 22.51X and the S&P 500’s 20.64X. Image Source: Zacks Investment Research Even compared with major peers, Magnite Inc. MGNI and PubMatic PUBM, which trade at 10.78X and 22.07X, respectively, TTD remains discounted. Given TTD’s prominent positioning in the demand-side platform (“DSP”) space, the valuation compression raises an important question — whether this is a temporary ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Trade Desk (TTD) is trading at a significant discount with a forward P/E of 10.29X, compared to industry peers.
• Connected TV (CTV) is a fast-growing channel for TTD, comprising about half of its business in Q4 2025.
• Retail media has emerged as another fast-growing area, with TTD building a large marketplace of retail data.
• The company's AI-powered DSP experience, Kokai, is used by nearly 100% of clients.
• International markets are growing faster than North America, representing roughly 16% of total revenues.
news.Keywords: digital ad tech, valuation discount, Connected TV, retail media, AI platform, international growth

news.Title: Should You Buy MP Materials Stock While It's Below $50?
news.Content: MP Materials (NYSE: MP) is a mining company with ambitions to become America's rare earth champion. For almost a decade, it has taken a formerly idle mine at Mountain Pass, California, and turned it into the only large-scale rare earth mining site in the United States. The final product of this mine, forged from the refined rare earth ...
news.AI_Summary:
• MP Materials aims to be America's rare earth champion, operating the only large-scale rare earth mining site in the US.
• China dominates the rare-earth metal market (69% of production), creating security risks for the US.
• The US government has a strategic $400 million partnership with MP Materials, including a guaranteed price floor for neodymium-praseodymium (NdPr).
• MP Materials is building its second magnet factory ('10X'), expected to open in 2028, increasing magnet output to 10,000 metric tons per year.
• The stock trades at a high valuation, with a nearly 1,430 times forward earnings and 37 times sales.
news.Keywords: rare earth elements, supply chain, US government partnership, magnet production, stock valuation, China dominance

news.Title: ‘Peak Memory’ Panic Is ‘Overblown’ Says Mizuho: Buy the Sandisk Stock Dip
news.Content: Mizuho Securities (MFG) recently announced that the dip in memory stocks offers a “Buy” opportunity, especially for Micron (MU) and SanDisk Corporation (SNDK). But this isn’t just another ‘buy the dip’ call. The firm explains the bull thesis in a way that every investor, especially those scared of volatility and buying at peak, needs to listen to. After calling the fears about declining memory usage in AI infrastructure ‘overblown’, analysts at Mizuho explained that TurboQuant’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Mizuho Securities recommends buying memory stocks like Micron (MU) and SanDisk (SNDK), calling fears of declining memory usage in AI 'overblown'.
• Improvements in technology, such as virtual machines and fiber optics, have historically led to increased demand rather than decreased demand.
• The rapid development of AI necessitates high memory demand, making it a 'winner takes all' race where progress is prioritized over cost savings.
• SanDisk (SNDK) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings with revenue up 61% year-over-year to $3.025 billion and non-GAAP gross margin surging to 51.1%.
news.Keywords: memory market, AI infrastructure, demand outlook, earnings growth, buy recommendation

news.Title: 3 High-Growth AI Stocks That Actually Pay You to Wait
news.Content: When investors think of dividend stocks, they usually think of boring companies that deliver single-digit stock returns and pay a few percentage points in dividends. This provides a bit more return security, as the companies are paying out a certain amount of profits each year rather than having to deal with whatever returns the market delivers. However, there is a segment of artificial intelligence (AI) ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) is a key player in AI, being the world's leading logic chip fabricator.
• TSMC management is bullish on AI, expecting chip revenue to have a mid- to high-50% CAGR between 2024 and 2029.
• Broadcom, a customer of TSMC, is experiencing exploding demand for its custom AI chips.
• Broadcom expects its custom AI chips to generate $100 billion in revenue by the end of 2027.
• Microsoft is seen as a safe AI investment due to its strong base business and cloud computing capabilities.
news.Keywords: AI chip fabrication, TSMC, Broadcom, custom AI chips, revenue growth, Microsoft, cloud computing

news.Title: 1 chart reveals how 'Magnificent 7' fortunes have fallen
news.Content: The Magnificent Seven stocks are hovering around fresh lows relative to the S&P 500 ( ^GSPC ), JPMorgan strategist Mislav Matejka pointed out in a new note on Tuesday (see chart below). "Mag 7 relative [to S&P 500] is not acting as a safe haven," Matejka said. The Magnificent Seven is a group of seven cash-rich, large-cap technology stocks that have collectively dominated the US stock market and driven the majority of the S&P ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Magnificent Seven stocks (Nvidia, Amazon, Tesla, Microsoft, Google, Apple, Meta) are hovering around fresh lows relative to the S&P 500.
• These tech stocks are under pressure as investors question aggressive AI spending plans, with companies aiming to spend $680 billion on AI capex in 2026.
• The 'Great Rotation' into less-loved market sectors has occurred, with small-caps and oil outperforming.
• The Magnificent Seven giants have collectively lost $1.1 trillion in market cap as of early April 2026.
• AI plays in emerging markets are showing strong momentum and are relatively more attractive than their U.S. counterparts.
news.Keywords: Magnificent Seven, AI spending, market rotation, market cap loss, emerging markets, stock performance

news.Title: Intel to Buy Back $14.2 Billion Fab 34 Stake From Apollo
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Intel ( NASDAQ:INTC ) is moving to reassert control over a critical manufacturing asset, agreeing to acquire Apollo Global Management's ( NYSE:APO ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel is acquiring Apollo Global Management's 49% stake in the Fab 34 joint venture for $14.2 billion.
• Fab 34 produces semiconductors using Intel 4 and Intel 3 process technologies, central to Intel's advanced node manufacturing.
• The transaction is funded by cash on hand and approximately $6.5 billion in new debt issuances.

• This move suggests Intel is placing increased strategic value on full ownership of key manufacturing capacity.

news.Title: Why April 10 Could Be a Big Day for the Stock Market
news.Content: The market has been anything but quiet. Earlier this year, stocks struggled to overcome mounting concerns about artificial intelligence (AI) and private credit, among other signs of frothiness. Then the Iran war triggered a real sell-off, sending the major indexes briefly into correction territory. Since then, the market has bobbed and weaved, largely on headline-driven news about when the conflict could end. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » Another potential catalyst for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The market is sensitive to the Iran war's impact on inflation, particularly the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
• Crude oil prices topped $100, with economists expecting the March Consumer Price Index (CPI) to surge.
• The Cleveland Fed's Inflation Nowcasting tool projects CPI to rise by 0.84% from February and 3.25% year-over-year.
• Strong March jobs data (178,000 jobs added, unemployment at 4.3%) eases recession concerns but makes Fed rate cuts less likely.
• Investors should not trade on CPI reports but watch for deviations from expectations.
news.Keywords: Iran war, inflation, CPI, oil prices, Federal Reserve, jobs report, interest rates

news.Title: Bank of America resets Apple stock forecast
news.Content: Apple ( AAPL ) stock has lost about 4.6% year to date, at the time of writing, Monday afternoon, April 6, according to Yahoo Finance . Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index ( SPY ) is down close to 3.5% in the same period. And while Apple is slightly lagging the S&P 500, so are the rest of the Magnificent 7 members. The rest of the Magnificent 7 stocks are also down in the same period: Microsoft ( MSFT ) is down almost 23%. Tesla ( TSLA ) is down 21.8%. Meta ( ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's stock is down 4.6% year-to-date, slightly lagging the S&P 500 and other Magnificent 7 members.
• Apple's AI strategy involves betting AI will become a commodity, keeping capital expenditures low ($14 billion vs. hyperscalers' $700 billion).
• The new MacBook Neo, priced at $599, sold out quickly and could unlock a $32 billion TAM in 2026.
• Bank of America estimates the MacBook Neo could add $0.03 to Apple's EPS if it captures 10% market share.
• The Neo model is expected to drive adoption among first-time Mac buyers, potentially increasing services use.
news.Keywords: Apple stock, AI strategy, capital expenditure, MacBook Neo, TAM, EPS, market share

news.Title: Apple's iPhone sales continue to surge as iPhone 17 outpaces iPhone 16
news.Content: Apple’s ( AAPL ) iPhone continued strong sales last month, thanks to the popularity of the iPhone 17 line, Bernstein analysts wrote in an investor note on Monday. According to the report, Global iPhone sell-through — that is, sales of iPhones from retailers to customers — increased 26% year over year in February. Overall, the analysts say iPhone 17 unit sales are up 20% versus last year’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's iPhone sales increased 26% year-over-year in February, driven by the iPhone 17 line.
• iPhone 17 unit sales are up 20% versus last year's iPhone 16 through September and January.
• Average Selling Price (ASP) climbed 6.9% year-over-year in February, improving each month since the iPhone 17 launch.
• China provided the biggest boost to ASP, with 20.2% year-over-year growth.
• The new MacBook Neo could provide an additional $0.03 earnings per share for 2026 if it captures 10% market share in the entry-level laptop space.

news.Title: 台股3月震盪擋不住投資熱！0050暴增42萬投資人 創台股ETF新紀錄
news.Content: 台股歷經動盪的 3 月，但 ETF 投資熱度未見降溫，據集保結算所統計至 4/2 當周，最強指標元大台灣 50(0050-TW) 單月暴增逾 42 萬人，總投 ...

news.Title: 英特爾強攻先進封裝 傳爭取谷歌.亞馬遜訂單
news.Content:

英特爾財務長指出，封裝業務已成為目前代工部門「最具潛力」的一環，最新傳出英特爾正與Google及Amazon洽談先進封裝合作，規模可能達每年 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 英特爾財務長指出，封裝業務已成為代工部門「最具潛力」的一環，傳正與Google及Amazon洽談先進封裝合作。
• 合作案規模可能達每年數十億美元，但英特爾代工部門2025年仍處虧損，且在先進封裝市場，台積電以CoWoS技術仍占主導地位。

• 英特爾挑戰台積電CoWoS地位，成為潛在競爭對手，但前員工對其擴建能否如期完成持保留態度。
• 台積電因長期不與客戶競爭的商業模式，較不易受客戶尋求第二供應來源影響。

news.Title: 中東戰火「專家喊有錢別放美國」！揭台積電「終極玩法」：未來都是笑的人
news.Content:
財經中心／綜合報導

隨著中東局勢升溫，全球資本市場波動加劇，不少投資人重新思考資產配置方向。最新媒體分析指出，在AI產業持續擴張之際，真正掌握關鍵優勢的企業未必來自美國，而是被視為「AI軍備競賽最大受益者」的台積電，被形容 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 隨著中東局勢升溫，台積電2025年營收達1224億美元，年成長翻倍，其中AI相關營收大幅成長48%。
• 台積電掌握約70%先進製程市場，具備難以撼動的護城河，相較競爭對手在技術與良率仍具優勢。
• 市場預估AI推論市場規模將由1060億美元成長至2030年的2550億美元，台積電可望持續受惠AI長期成長趨勢。
• 專家認為，與其押注單一AI軟體或平台，不如轉向「賣鏟子的人」，即晶片製造商。
• 台積電被形容為不論哪家科技巨頭勝出，都能穩定獲利的「終極玩家」。
news.Keywords: 台積電,AI,營收,成長,先進製程,護城河,AI推論,晶片製造,NVIDIA,Microsoft,Amazon

news.Title: AI拋售潮！外媒點名「這2檔必須買進」台積電也上榜
news.Content:
財經中心／周孟漢報導

儘管近期科技股遭遇拋售，導致標普500指數今年以來下跌約4％，但市場專家普遍認為，這波由人工智慧（AI）驅動的牛市「還沒跑完」。摩根士丹利（MorganStanley）預計，全球AI相關支出在2028年 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 儘管近期科技股遭遇拋售，但專家認為AI牛市「還沒跑完」，摩根士丹利預計全球AI相關支出2028年將飆破3兆美元。
• 目前仍有高達80%的AI預算尚未投入，科技股回檔為投資人拉出「上車」空間。
• 外媒點名Palantir Technologies（PLTR）及台積電（TSMC）為目前值得關注的潛力標的。
• Palantir的「人工智慧平台（AIP）」能將AI模型轉化為企業省錢工具，去年營收成長56%，第四季營收增長70%。
• 台積電身為全球先進製程唯一代名詞，在AI產業具「無可取代」地位，營業利益率54%展現定價權。
news.Keywords: AI,科技股,拋售潮,Palantir,台積電,摩根士丹利,營收,獲利,股價,AI平台

news.Title: Is This Biotech Stock Your Best Shot at Building a Millionaire-Making Position?
news.Content: Investors looking for stocks that can turn a modest portfolio into a multimillion-dollar nest egg often find what they're looking for in the biotech industry . For several years, CRISPR Therapeutics (NASDAQ: CRSP) has been attracting investment from Cathie Wood's Ark Innovation ETF . At the moment, it's the fund's second largest holding, at 6.6% of the overall portfolio. You don't have to command billions like Wood does to see what makes CRISPR Therapeutics look like a millionaire-maker stock. It ...
news.AI_Summary:
• CRISPR Therapeutics (CRSP) has an approved therapy, Casgevy, but faces manufacturing challenges.
• Vertex Pharmaceuticals, the manufacturing partner, did not generate profit from Casgevy to share with CRISPR Therapeutics last year.
• Harvesting viable stem cells for Casgevy production has been extremely challenging.
• CRISPR Therapeutics lost $664.6 million last year, relying on new drug candidates like CTX310 for future growth.
• CTX310, an mRNA-based treatment, showed potential in lowering cholesterol and triglycerides by about half in a Phase 1 study.
news.Keywords: CRISPR Therapeutics, Casgevy, manufacturing challenges, stem cell collection, drug candidates, dyslipidemia

• Micron plans another similar site at Tongluo before the end of fiscal 2026 to produce advanced DRAM products, including HBM, for AI usage.
• The new facility strengthens Micron's edge in exploiting future opportunities in the memory market.
• Micron is considered one of the 10 best AI chip stocks to buy according to hedge funds.
news.Keywords: Micron Technology, DRAM, HBM, AI usage, semiconductor manufacturing, mega campus expansion, memory market

news.Title: Should You Really Buy Stocks Now? Fundstrat's Tom Lee and Billionaire Bill Ackman Offer an Answer That's Crystal Clear.
news.Content: Investors have been through countless ups and downs since the start of the year: Positive tech earnings reports and talk of soaring artificial intelligence (AI) demand offered reason for optimism. But worries about AI spending climbing too high, too fast tempered the mood. Since late February, the war in Iran has weighed on investor sentiment, but any signs that the turmoil may soon be over have offered the market a boost. All ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Fundstrat's Tom Lee and Bill Ackman suggest buying stocks now, believing the market is 90-95% through the sell-off.
• The S&P 500 ended Q1 down 4.6%, influenced by AI spending concerns, high oil prices, and the Iran war.
• Nvidia (NVDA) is trading at 21x forward earnings estimates, its lowest in a year, offering value with high growth.
• Nvidia reported quarterly revenue soared 73% to $68 billion.
• Experts advise investing for the long term (at least five years) to mitigate short-term market movements.
news.Keywords: market outlook, stock buying, AI spending, oil prices, Iran war, Nvidia valuation, long-term investing

news.Title: Is the Stock Market About to Fall Sharply? Prediction Markets Flash a Warning, but Wall Street Sees Buying Opportunities.
news.Content: Recession fears have resurfaced as the Iran war has pushed oil prices to a multiyear high. In turn, investors have rotated away from stocks in favor of safer assets such as U.S. Treasuries. The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) is currently 6% below its high, and predication markets traders expect the index to fall even further in the coming months. Yet Wall Street sees buying opportunities across the technology sector, particularly ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Prediction markets show a 60% chance of the S&P 500 falling below 5,900 due to the Iran war and high oil prices.
• Despite potential downside, traders anticipate strong buying activity as the market declines.
• Wall Street analysts have raised forward earnings estimates for the technology sector, with consensus growth increasing to 45% for Q1.
• Analysts are particularly bullish on Micron (MU) and Nvidia (NVDA), with median target prices implying 50% upside.
• The discrepancy between strong earnings estimate revisions and dismal recent returns creates a buying opportunity in tech.
news.Keywords: prediction markets, S&P 500, Iran war, oil prices, earnings estimates, tech sector, buying opportunity

news.Title: Bull of the Day: Lam Research (LRCX)
news.Content: Few companies occupy as unique and valuable a position as Lam Research ( LRCX ), yet it remains relatively underfollowed by the general public. The company holds a near-duopoly position in two critical segments of the semiconductor manufacturing process: etch equipment and deposition. Etch equipment is Lam’s core strength, involving the technology that etches intricate patterns into silicon wafers. These architectures form the interface between ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Lam Research (LRCX) holds a near-duopoly in etch equipment and deposition for semiconductor manufacturing.
• Analysts maintain a strongly bullish sentiment, with 24 out of 28 analysts assigning Buy ratings.

• Barclays increased the price target to $255, maintaining an Equal Weight rating, citing a strong investment environment for wafer fab equipment.

news.Title: Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Amazon, and Microsoft Are Sending Shockwaves Through Wall Street With This $16 Billion Warning
news.Content: For much of the last 17 years, the bulls have been in firm control on Wall Street. However, it's the stock market's largest and most influential companies that are responsible for most of the heavy lifting . I'm talking about the $2 trillion-and-up club, consisting of Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) , Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) . Since the benchmark S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) hit its financial crisis low on March 9, 2009, it's rallied 873%, through the closing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The 'Magnificent Seven' companies (Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon) have shown significant outperformance since March 2009.
• These companies possess sustainable competitive advantages: Nvidia's GPUs in AI, Apple's iPhone dominance, Google's search monopoly, Microsoft's Windows/Azure, and Amazon's e-commerce/AWS leadership.
• These businesses are leveraging the AI revolution, with Nvidia dominating hardware and others seeing reaccelerating cloud sales.
• Insiders at these five companies have net-sold nearly $16.1 billion in stock over the trailing two years.
• This insider selling trend is a $16 billion warning that investors should not ignore.
news.Keywords: Magnificent Seven, competitive advantages, AI revolution, insider selling, stock performance, market leadership

news.Title: 台新證併元富證 吳東亮：台股全球第七 券商整併最佳時候
news.Content:
台新新光金控子公司台新證券及元富證券、台新期貨及元富期貨已正式合併，台新金董事長吳東亮表示，台股已是全球第七大的資本市場「非常不容易」 ，是證券公司合併最好的時機。

台新金控董事長吳東亮表示，台灣經濟近年快 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台新證券及元富證券、台新期貨及元富期貨已正式合併，台新金董事長吳東亮表示，台股已是全球第七大資本市場。
• 台灣經濟近年快速成長，資本市場表現亮眼，台股躍升為全球第七大資本市場，是證券業整併的好時機。
• 台新證券與元富證券各有強項、具互補性，在投資銀行承銷與數位金融發展突出。
• 合併後將擁有全台79個營業據點，服務範圍更廣，未來將持續深化服務，提升投資人體驗。
• 台新證券將透過專業顧問團隊布局海外市場，並引進國際資金與人才回流台灣。
news.Keywords: 台新證券,元富證券,合併,台股,資本市場,證券業,整併,吳東亮,AI

news.Title: 《台股盤後》量縮收漲657點，收復月線
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-07 15:51:47 新聞中心 發佈

美股週一全面上揚，台股今(7)日開高走高，且在記憶股如南亞科/威剛走高、IC載板南電漲停 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美股週一全面上揚，台股7日開高走高，在記憶股如南亞科/威剛走高、IC載板南電漲停/欣興漲近9%、AI設備股鴻勁漲4.6%/致茂漲2.3%、LEO概念股昇達科漲停下，市場人氣漸回籠。
• 權王台積電全場強勢，加權指數終場收在33229.82點、上漲657.39點或2.02%、收復月線，成交量縮至5643.42億元。
• 美伊停火協議似有進展，加上美股投資人漸忽略戰事變數因子，輔以美光等記憶股回神漲逾3%，激勵市場信心。
• 電子權值股與AI供應鏈股多有反彈，台積電收在1860元，上漲2.76%，聯電大漲逾8%，台達電也有近6%漲幅。
• 三大法人今日總計買超195.59億元，外資買超100.75億元，投信買超24.51億元，自營商買超70.32億元。
news.Keywords: 台股,美股,台積電,記憶股,IC載板,AI設備,LEO概念股,美伊停火,成交量,三大法人

news.Title: 【盤後焦點】投資人觀望中東戰事進展　台股量縮反彈657點
news.Content: （中央社記者潘智義台北2026年4月7日電）美國總統川普揚言炸毀伊朗所有電廠，但調停國也提出45天停火與重開荷莫茲海峽的方案，台股今天反映長假期間美股及日韓股市漲勢，終場反 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國總統川普揚言炸毀伊朗所有電廠，但調停國提出45天停火與重開荷姆茲海峽方案，台股7日反映美股及日韓股市漲勢，終場反彈上漲657.39點，收在33229.82點。
• 市場觀望氣氛濃厚，成交值量縮至5643.42億元。
• 台積電尾盤急拉，收盤漲50元至1860元，貢獻指數約400點。
• 矽光子概念股聯亞、波若威漲停創新高，聯鈞、光聖勁揚；低軌衛星概念股昇達科漲停，華通、啟碁表現強勁。
• 兆豐國際投顧副總經理黃國偉表示，台股漲勢強過美股，應是投資人樂觀預期美伊戰局，若明天美伊釋出有效解決方案將有利盤勢。

news.Title: 亞股淪外資提款機？台股上周慘遭賣超50億美元 韓、印股未倖免
news.Content: 受美伊兩國展現停火意願激勵，全球股債資產在過去一週同步展開反彈 。儘管雙方言辭交鋒依然激烈，市場仍對中東局勢趨緩抱持正面解讀，帶動資金大舉回流 。根據統計，過去一週全球股票型 ETF ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受美伊兩國展現停火意願激勵，全球股債資產同步反彈，資金大舉回流。
• 過去一週全球股票型ETF獲淨流入148.1億美元，美國市場吸金力最強。
• 亞洲、中國及歐洲市場持續面臨資金淨流出壓力，台股遭外資淨賣超高達50億美元。
• 南韓與印度股市也未能倖免，分別出現39億美元與31億美元賣壓。
• 富蘭克林證券投顧分析，儘管中東戰事與通膨走勢仍有不確定性，但隨多項關鍵經濟數據公布，企業基本面將重新主導盤面方向。
news.Keywords: 全球股市,股債,反彈,資金流向,ETF,美股,亞洲股市,台股,外資,賣超,南韓,印度,富蘭克林證券

news.Title: 【公告】智原 2026年3月合併營收10.67億元 年增-69.38%
news.AI_Summary:
• ASIC設計服務廠智原3月合併營收10.66億元，年減69.38%，累計第一季合併營收25.89億元，年減65.2%。
• 公司說明，營收下滑主因為量產專案減少，去年同期基期較高，加上客戶產品進入世代交替期，導致短期出貨動能轉弱。
• 法人指出，ASIC產業營運高度仰賴專案進度，從前期NRE到後段量產階段，營收貢獻差異顯著。
• 智原近期表現為典型案例，營收可能出現明顯修正。
• 隨美系雲端服務供應商（CSP）積極發展自研ASIC，帶動ASIC設計服務需求持續擴大。
news.Keywords: 智原,ASIC,營收,年減,量產專案,NRE,CSP,AI

• 外資買超100.75億元，自營商買超70.33億元，投信買超24.51億元。
• 外資買超聯電4.9萬張居冠，也買超ETF商品、凱基金、瑞軒、台塑、中石化。
• 外資賣超面板雙虎友達、群創，合計賣超13.4萬張，調節華邦電約1.9萬張。
• 投信與自營商也青睞聯電，同步作多聯電共5千張，也看好頎邦，聯手敲進1.2萬張。

news.Title: 國泰投信：地緣政治雜音不改長多 台積電法說將成台股「定海神針」
news.Content: 關稅風暴後時隔一年，中東戰爭的煙硝又讓全球市場陷入詭譎多變的局面，國際油價更在通膨疑慮下突破百元大關。國泰投信指出，從 2025 年的歷史經驗來看，地緣政治的訊號對股市的衝擊大多是短暫且劇烈，卻也常是中長期布局的良機 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 國泰投信認為，地緣政治雜音不改台股長多格局，企業獲利動能是市場焦點。
• 下週台積電法說會展望是重中之重，先進封裝供不應求與AI需求擴張支撐台股震盪向上。
• 儘管美伊衝突導致油價攀升，但市場對戰事干擾已具心理免疫力。
• 4月法說會旺季將至，市場目光轉向科技產業訂單與展望，PCB、記憶體與電力族群是焦點。
• 預期台積電法說會釋出先進封裝產能及AI晶片需求正向訊號，有望帶動台股反彈。
news.Keywords: 台股,地緣政治,台積電法說會,AI,先進封裝

news.Content:

news.AI_Summary:
• 南亞科（2408）首季營收突破490億元，年增583%，遠超預期。
• 受惠於DRAM價格調漲與DDR4供應短缺，大和證券調升目標價至292元，維持「買進」評等。
• 預期DDR4強勁需求將持續至2026年，因主要DRAM廠加速轉向DDR5。
• 私募案將為南亞科注入約25億美元資金，強化財務體質，帳面價值預計提升16.8%。
• 企業級SSD需求上升帶動緩衝DRAM採購，純NAND業者採購量增加。
news.Keywords: 南亞科,DRAM,DDR4,營收,目標價

news.Title: One Wall Street Analyst Sees Tesla Crashing 60%. Are They Right?
news.Content: With a market cap of $1.3 trillion and cutting-edge technology, Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) has earned its membership in the vaunted "Magnificent Seven" group of top tech stocks, but there's an important difference between Tesla and the rest of the Magnificent Seven . The six other tech giants trade at valuations that are within range of the S&P 500 . In fact, you can make an argument that any of them are undervalued based on their growth rates and competitive advantages compared to the broad-market index. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman issued a bearish note on Tesla, predicting a 60% stock price decline to $145.
• Tesla's core EV business declined by volume in 2024 and 2025, with revenue slightly below 2023 levels.
• Operating income fell by half due to plunging margins amid increased EV competition.
• The stock's high valuation is not supported by current financial results, despite Elon Musk's vision for robotaxis and robots.
news.Keywords: bearish outlook, stock price target, EV business decline, operating income, valuation concerns

news.Title: Elon Musk makes a stunning claim about Tesla's chip future
news.Content: On a Saturday night in Austin, standing inside a defunct power plant, Elon Musk delivered a message that cut straight to the heart of the AI chip shortage: His companies cannot get the chips they need, so they are going to build their own. Musk shared on March 21 that Tesla, SpaceX , and xAI are launching a joint venture called Terafab, a semiconductor fabrication facility to be built adjacent to Tesla's Giga Texas campus in Austin. The project is estimated to cost between $20 billion ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Elon Musk announced a joint venture, Terafab, to build a semiconductor fabrication facility costing $20-$25 billion.
• The facility aims to produce chips for Tesla's FSD, Optimus robots, and SpaceX's space-based data centers.
• It targets 2-nanometer process technology with an initial output of 100,000 wafer starts per month.
• Industry analysts expressed skepticism due to Musk's lack of semiconductor manufacturing background and the project's immense scale.
news.Keywords: semiconductor fabrication, Terafab, AI chips, SpaceX, Tesla

news.Title: Samsung Beats High Estimates After AI Chip Sales Defy War Fears
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Samsung Electronics Co. earned a far stronger-than-expected eight-fold leap in quarterly profit, underscoring robust demand for AI memory chips in the face of markets roiled by war in the Middle East. Customers led by cloud service providers are ramping up orders for high-bandwidth memory and other chips used in data centers to feed artificial intelligence services, lifting ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Samsung Electronics reported a record preliminary operating profit of 57.2 trillion won ($37.9 billion) for Q1, an eight-fold leap.
• Revenue climbed to 133 trillion won, exceeding analyst expectations.
• Robust demand for AI memory chips, particularly High Bandwidth Memory (HBM), drove the strong results.
• Samsung dominates global memory supply with SK Hynix and Micron, shifting production towards HBM for AI accelerators.
news.Keywords: AI chips, memory market, HBM, quarterly profit, revenue growth

news.Title: 4/7「台股重挫一週年」 ！ 謝金河嘆：每年這時都有大事
news.Content: 去年的清明連假，川普以對等關稅撼動全球市場，台股寫下單日崩跌逾二千點的慘烈紀錄，台積電更一度殺破八百元大關。當時謝金河挺身喊話，將那場風暴定義為「人造熊市」中的絕佳買點。如今一年過去，世界焦點轉向伊朗，川普再次發揮其影響 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 回顧去年清明連假，川普的對等關稅政策引發全球股市崩盤，台股單日重挫逾2000點。
• 當時謝金河將此風暴定義為「人造熊市」中的絕佳買點，台積電當時跌破800元。
• 今年世界焦點轉向伊朗，川普再次發揮影響力，市場屏息以待。
• 謝金河認為，川普不斷對伊朗叫板，全球股市緊盯油價波動，此次將是另一場驚嚇或驚喜有待觀察。
• 去年台股在連假期間府院高度關切，謝金河建議無需護盤。
news.Keywords: 台股,川普,關稅政策,地緣政治,市場展望

news.Content: 小編今天（7）日精選5件國內外重要財經大事。美伊戰爭持續干擾全球金融市場，美國總統川普喊話最快6日與伊朗達成協議，也警告若伊朗不簽署協議或重新開放荷姆茲海峽 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊談判進入關鍵36小時，川普設定伊朗開放荷姆茲海峽的最後期限為美東時間7日晚間8時。
• 法人預期談判破局機率偏高，但失望性賣壓不會一次大舉出籠，台股開盤小幅下跌機率高。
• 光通訊產業鏈迎升級潮，AI伺服器與資料中心互聯需求帶動新一輪擴產與升級。
• 台積電將於4月16日召開法說會，外界看好其首季營收規模站穩兆元大關。
• 台塑四寶受惠於油價飆漲，第一季營運可望全面擺脫虧損。
news.Keywords: 美伊談判,台股,光通訊,台積電法說會,台塑四寶

news.Title: Which Artificial Intelligence (AI) Supercycle Stock Will Make You Richer Over the Next 10 Years?
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle is creating huge opportunities across chips and data center infrastructure. And at a glance, both Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) and Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) look like reasonable ways to invest in that trend. Both have products tied to AI data centers, and both are trying to win a bigger slice of the next wave of computing demand. But when comparing the two, I think one of these two chip companies is a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) reported strong Q4 2025 results with revenue up 34% year-over-year to $10.3 billion, driven by a 39% increase in data center revenue to $5.4 billion.
• For the full year 2025, AMD's revenue grew 34% to $34.6 billion, with data center revenue up 32% to $16.6 billion.
• The company anticipates Q1 2026 revenue to be around $9.8 billion, representing approximately 32% year-over-year growth.
• Intel's Q4 2025 revenue declined 4% year-over-year to $13.7 billion, and its data center and AI segment grew 9%.
news.Keywords: AI, semiconductor, data center, revenue growth, market share, earnings

news.Title: 連假後台股剉咧等？專家揭2資產「豬羊變色」：世界走到了轉折時刻
news.Content:
財經中心／林昀萱報導

美國和以色列在2月底對伊朗展開軍事行動，中東戰火蔓延至今，世界各國股市都慘遭波及，今（7）日是台股清明連假後開盤首日，走勢也 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 財經專家阮慕驊指出，中東戰爭正在改變全球經濟和金融結構，大宗物資表現強勁，比特幣表現疲弱。
• 過去數年大宗物資表現通常最差，比特幣則是當紅炸子雞，今年情況出現「豬羊變色」。
• 專家認為這是「脫虛入實」趨勢，實物資產（油、天然氣、糧食）價值被重新認識。
• 未來世界的秩序和格局正在重塑，「世界走到了轉折時刻」。
• 投資人應以不同視角看待資產配置。
news.Keywords: 中東戰爭,大宗物資,比特幣,經濟結構,資產配置

news.Content:

美伊停火協議似有進展，加上美國總統川普(Donald Trump)威脅若伊朗未能重啟荷姆茲海峽、雙方戰事將大幅升溫，美國四大指數震盪走揚。

道瓊工業平均指數4月 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停火協議似有進展，加上川普威脅若伊朗未能重啟荷姆茲海峽，美股四大指數震盪走揚。

news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

美國股市周一（6）日延續反彈氣勢，四大指數全面收紅，其中那斯達克指數上漲117點（+0.54%）、標普500指數上漲0.44%，費城半導體指數更強勢上漲1.06%，顯示科技股與半導體族群重新獲得資金青睞。美股四大指 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美股周一延續反彈氣勢，四大指數全面收紅，費城半導體指數強勢上漲1.06%，科技股獲資金青睞。
• 市場情緒回穩主因對美伊停火談判抱持期待，但地緣政治風險仍未解除，油價維持高檔。
• 美國最新數據呈現分歧，服務業擴張放緩，但就業市場仍具韌性，通膨指標升至近兩年高點。
• 台股期貨與籌碼面顯示短線有機會技術性反彈，但外資仍偏保守。
• 台股短線處於「利多與風險交錯」關鍵時刻，操作宜採取保守中帶彈性策略。
news.Keywords: 台股,美股,地緣政治風險,通膨,操作策略

news.Title: 1 Brilliant Growth Stock to Buy Before It Joins Nvidia in the $4 Trillion Club
news.Content: While the number can change from day to day, there are currently 12 companies with a market cap of $1 trillion or more, but only one is a member of the prestigious $4 trillion club: Nvidia . The company supplies the graphics processing units (GPUs) that kick-started the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution, but some investors are looking ahead to see what comes next. The stock market has pulled back thanks to geopolitical uncertainty, and some are wary of big tech's spending plans, but I remain convinced that Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) is poised to join Nvidia in this prestigious club in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon is presented as a growth stock poised to potentially reach a $4 trillion market capitalization, joining Nvidia.
• In Q4, Amazon's revenue grew 14% year-over-year, with AWS revenue up 24% and digital advertising up 23%.
• The company plans a significant $200 billion capex investment over the next year, citing strong AWS demand.
• Amazon's market cap is approximately $2.3 trillion, requiring substantial growth to reach the $4 trillion target.
news.Keywords: growth stock, market cap, AWS, cloud infrastructure, capital expenditure, AI

news.Title: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Unite to Combat Model Copying in China
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Rivals OpenAI, Anthropic PBC, and Alphabet Inc.’s Google have begun working together to try to clamp down on Chinese competitors extracting results from cutting-edge US artificial intelligence models to gain an edge in the global AI race. The firms are sharing information through the Frontier Model Forum, an industry nonprofit that the three tech companies founded with Microsoft Corp. in 2023, to detect so-called adversarial distillation attempts that violate their terms of service, according to people familiar with the matter. The rare collaboration underscores the severity ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Rivals OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google are collaborating through the Frontier Model Forum to combat adversarial distillation by Chinese competitors.
• This collaboration aims to detect and prevent unauthorized replication of US AI models, which costs Silicon Valley billions annually.
• OpenAI accused Chinese firm DeepSeek of attempting to 'free-ride' on its capabilities.
• Distillation is a technique where an older AI model trains a newer one, often at lower cost.
• US AI labs warn that foreign adversaries could use distillation to develop AI models stripped of safety guardrails.
news.Keywords: AI model protection, adversarial distillation, Frontier Model Forum, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, China competition, safety guardrails

news.Title: Google Researchers Unveil 20x Lower Quantum Resources Needed to Break Crypto
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Google ( NASDAQ:GOOG ) researchers are signaling a potentially meaningful shift in how investors should think about long-term crypto security, warning that advances in quantum computing could reduce the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google Quantum AI researchers estimate quantum computing could require 20x fewer resources to break cryptography.
• New quantum circuits suggest attacks on elliptic curve cryptography could be executed in minutes with fewer than 500,000 physical qubits.
• While not an immediate threat, this could accelerate the timeline for blockchain security challenges.
• Google plans to migrate all its security systems to post-quantum cryptography by 2029 and encourages industry migration.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, cryptography, blockchain security, post-quantum cryptography, timeline acceleration, cybersecurity

news.Title: 法說會倒數，雙王未演先轟動！台積電 Q1營收拚穩兆元

• AI需求強勁，涵蓋GPU、ASIC、網通晶片與CPU，帶動台積電訂單能見度拉長，預估2026年營收成長近3成。

news.Title: 2 reasons why Microsoft stock has been shredded
news.Content: Some of the headwinds that have plowed through Microsoft's ( MSFT ) stock are unlikely to abate in the near term. First, upward revisions to capital expenditures without commensurate upward revisions to Azure cloud sales. This ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft's (MSFT) stock has fallen 23% this year due to upward revisions in capital expenditures without commensurate Azure cloud sales increases.
• This raises concerns about ROI and Azure's competitive positioning against peers like Amazon's AWS.
• Ongoing concerns exist that Microsoft's business applications may be disrupted by AI competition like Anthropic's Claude Cowork.
• Investors are focused on Microsoft's $37.5 billion capex for data centers, potentially pressuring profit margins.

news.Title: Nvidia acquisition of SchedMD sparks worry among AI specialists about software access
news.Content: By Max A. Cherney and Stephen Nellis TORONTO/SAN FRANCISCO, April 6 (Reuters) - A niche acquisition by Nvidia has raised concerns among artificial-intelligence and supercomputer specialists who see the move as a test of the biggest AI chip company's commitment to maintaining a fair playing field for chip rivals and AI data center builders. Nvidia ‌last December announced it would acquire SchedMD, giving it control of open-source software called Slurm, which schedules computing tasks and is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's acquisition of SchedMD, which controls the Slurm workload scheduler software, raises concerns among AI specialists.
• There are fears Nvidia may favor its own chips in software updates over rivals like AMD.
• Slurm software is critical for training large language models and is used in about 60% of supercomputers worldwide.
• Nvidia states its commitment to providing free, open-source, vendor-neutral software for all customers.
news.Keywords: AI software, workload scheduler, open source, competitive concerns, supercomputing, market fairness

news.Title: AI-Quantum Supercycle: 4 Stocks to Watch in April With 50%+ Upside
news.Content: The technology sector may be entering what could become the AI–quantum supercycle, a multi-decade computing transition similar to the shift from mainframes to cloud computing. If the AI boom represented the first phase of the next computing revolution, the convergence of artificial intelligence, quantum computing and cybersecurity could represent the second phase, driven by rising cybersecurity risks, government funding and growing demand for computing power beyond classical limits. While artificial intelligence has dominated markets since 2023, the next phase of computing innovation increasingly points toward quantum computing integrated with AI. Real-world examples ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The technology sector may be entering an AI-quantum supercycle, driven by AI, quantum computing, and cybersecurity convergence.
• Global quantum computing market projected to grow from $2 billion in 2026 to over $18 billion by 2034.
• AI + quantum cybersecurity is a growing concern, with AI-driven cyberattacks and quantum threats accelerating cybersecurity spending.
• Stocks like NVIDIA (NVDA), Microsoft (MSFT), IonQ (IONQ), and Rigetti Computing (RGTI) are highlighted for potential upside.
• Google's Quantum AI team estimates a 10% chance of quantum computers breaking public-key cryptography by 2032.
news.Keywords: AI, quantum computing, cybersecurity, supercycle, market growth, technological convergence

news.Title: 4 Retirement Rules That Changed in 2026 That Every Saver Should Know
news.Content: Retiring seems like a straightforward process: save enough money, stop working, and live out the rest of your golden years in financial security. However, recent tax changes, higher contribution limits for retirement accounts, and new rules for required minimum distributions (RMDs) might alter your retirement plans. Let's review the four most significant changes. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Retirement contribution limits have been increased for individuals aged 50-59 and 60-63 for 2025 and 2026.
• High earners ($150,000+) must now use Roth plans for catch-up contributions.
• The SECURE 2.0 Act provides more flexibility for RMDs, including reduced penalties and adjusted starting ages.
• Inherited RMD rules are simplified, allowing surviving spouses to wait until age 73 to begin withdrawals.
news.Keywords: retirement planning, contribution limits, Roth IRA, RMDs, tax law, financial security

• The demand for advanced chip packaging is significantly driven by artificial intelligence workloads.

news.Title: PLTR Rides AI Momentum and Strong Profitability: A Stock Worth Buying?
news.Content: Palantir Technologies PLTR has emerged as one of the most talked-about companies in the artificial intelligence ecosystem. Its powerful data analytics platforms and growing role in defense and commercial AI adoption have attracted significant investor attention. With the stock delivering a strong 91% gain over the past year and the company posting impressive growth metrics, Palantir remains firmly on investors’ radar. However, valuation concerns and rising competition from major technology companies seemingly create a balanced investment outlook. Image Source: Zacks Investment Research AI Strategy Positions Palantir for Long-Term Growth Palantir’s growth story is closely tied to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies (PLTR) has seen its stock price increase by 91% over the past year, fueled by its AI strategy and strong growth metrics.
• The company's platforms are utilized in the defense sector, including participation in the DoD's Open DAGIR project.
• Palantir's U.S. commercial customer base is expanding via AIP boot camps and a modular sales approach, contributing to a 24.2% revenue CAGR from 2021-2025.
• Ending 2025 with $7.2 billion in cash and no debt provides Palantir with substantial financial flexibility for ongoing investments.

news.Content:
財經中心／廖珪如報導

全球環境雜訊強，台股3月震盪，現正處於盤是轉折點。法人指出，當前盤勢位於多空分界，投資決策若出現偏差，恐將對中期操作方向產生顯著影響，持股策略成為左右後續績效的關鍵。法人分析 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股3月震盪，處於多空分界點，持股策略成為關鍵，千元高價電子股為觀察盤勢強弱指標。
• 美伊衝突延宕及川普對中東局勢發言，使油價前景充滿變數，未來油價走勢關鍵取決於伊朗對荷姆茲海峽的動作。
• Touch Taiwan展覽帶動光電族群，CPO應用受關注，法人偏多富采（3714）。
• SpaceX遞件IPO可能引發低軌衛星題材獲利了結壓力，建議關注補漲股敬鵬（2355）。鄭習會預期支撐中概股題材。

news.Title: The Pullback in Meta Could Be a Gift. Here's Whether to Take It.
news.Content: In the opening months of 2026, shares of Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) have dropped sharply -- erasing roughly 14% of their value year to date and trading about 28% below all-time high prices near $780 in late 2025. Interestingly, Meta's sell-off is not rooted in waning demand for the company's core advertising products. Instead, investors have recoiled ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) shares have declined 14% year-to-date and are trading 28% below their all-time highs, attributed to aggressive capital expenditure (capex) plans and regulatory issues.
• Meta reported $201 billion in revenue for fiscal year 2025, a 22% increase year-over-year, with stable 41% operating margins and $44 billion in free cash flow.
• The company's $135 billion AI investment for 2026 is viewed as directly benefiting its ad business, contrasting with the metaverse investment.
• With a forward P/E near 19, Meta's stock is trading at its lowest valuation since last summer, presenting a potential buying opportunity.
news.Keywords: capex, regulatory risk, revenue growth, operating margin, AI spending, stock valuation

news.Title: What's Behind Credo's Strong Margins and Profitability Gains?
news.Content: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd CRDO reported strong third-quarter fiscal 2026 margins and profitability gains driven by several factors. The company attributes its performance to the continued build-out of large-scale AI clusters, where increasing system complexity has made reliability, power efficiency, latency and total cost of ownership critical. Its purpose-built SerDes technology, vertically integrated system-level model and advanced telemetry capabilities have enabled deep strategic partnerships and differentiated solutions. Strong demand for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Credo Technology Group (CRDO) delivered record Q3 fiscal 2026 performance with revenue of $407 million (up 52% sequentially, tripling YoY).
• Non-GAAP gross margin reached 68.6%, and operating margin expanded to 49.6%, with non-GAAP net income at $208.8 million.
• Growth is attributed to strong demand for AI clusters, active electrical cables (AECs), and increasing customer diversification.
• Management projects mid-single-digit sequential growth in fiscal 2027, translating to over 50% year-over-year growth.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, revenue growth, gross margin, operating margin, AECs, future projections

news.Title: Can Meta Stock Hit $3,727 per Share?
news.Content: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) currently trades for about $535 per share. However, there's a goal for it to reach $3,727 per share by 2031. That's a long way away from today's price, but why is this the target? The social media giant is offering a massive ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) aims for a $9 trillion market capitalization by 2031, which would translate to a $3,727 stock price.
• Achieving this goal likely requires success in developing new capabilities beyond social media, such as AI glasses.
• If Meta sells 250 million AI glasses with a $50 monthly subscription, it could generate $150 billion in annual revenue.
• This new revenue stream, while significant, may not be sufficient on its own to justify a $9 trillion market cap.
news.Keywords: market capitalization, AI glasses, subscription revenue, new products, valuation target, business model

news.Title: Goldman Sachs' blunt warning to laid-off tech workers: It will take time and earnings loss to find a new job
news.Content: Goldman Sachs is out with a blunt take for tech workers being displaced by AI: Expect a lengthy search to secure a job that will probably pay less than your previous gig. "Workers displaced from technology-disrupted occupations face more difficult short-run transitions back into employment," Goldman Sachs strategist Pierfrancesco Mei wrote in a new note on Monday. "They take approximately one month longer to find a new job ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Goldman Sachs notes that tech workers displaced by AI face longer job searches and potential real earnings losses of over 3%.
• Occupational downgrading is a key factor, with displaced workers moving into more routine roles.
• Massive layoffs have occurred at companies like Block (40% workforce reduction), Amazon, Oracle, and Meta due to AI adoption.
• The tech industry saw 18,720 job cuts in March, a 40% year-over-year increase, with AI investment cited as a driver.
news.Keywords: AI displacement, job search, earnings loss, occupational downgrading, tech layoffs, workforce trends

news.Title: Tesla just pulled off an EV shocker no one saw coming
news.Content: Tesla ( TSLA ) is back in business after a brutal few quarters. It's at the top of the global battery-electric vehicle market, and the timing could not be more important. The EV maker said it delivered 358,023 vehicles in the first quarter, ample growth to move past BYD ’s 310,389 battery-electric sales and reclaim the global BEV crown. That's great news for Tesla and signals that demand for its cars remains high amid a troubling geopolitical atmosphere. That's the good news for Tesla. The ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla delivered 358,023 vehicles in Q1, reclaiming the global battery-electric vehicle (BEV) crown from BYD.
• However, Q1 deliveries missed analyst expectations and represented Tesla's worst delivery quarter in a year, with over 50,000 vehicles left unsold.
• This miss is attributed to uneven demand, particularly in the U.S. following the expiration of EV tax credits, and increased global competition.
• BYD's sales fell 30% year-over-year in Q1, partly due to China's new EV purchase tax and efforts to curb price wars.
news.Keywords: EV deliveries, market share, analyst expectations, inventory levels, EV competition, China market

news.Title: Billionaire Warren Buffett Just Said 5 Words That Confirmed Wall Street's Deepest Fears
news.Content: As billionaire Warren Buffett has aged, his public appearances have understandably become less common. Now that Buffett is no longer CEO of Berkshire Hathaway , I'd expect public appearances for the 95-year-old to become even more rare. Recently, however, Buffett gave an interview to CNBC and offered several interesting insights into Berkshire's holdings. Investors always scrutinize what the Oracle of Omaha has to say, given his ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett indicated that Berkshire Hathaway views the current market as overvalued, stating 'but not in this market' regarding potential Apple stock purchases.
• Berkshire Hathaway holds Apple as its largest holding, accounting for 23% of its stock portfolio at the end of 2025.
• The market's high valuation is also suggested by the S&P 500's Shiller CAPE ratio being well above its 10-year average.
• The Buffett indicator (Wilshire 5,000 to GDP) has also been at all-time highs, suggesting potential overvaluation.
news.Keywords: market valuation, investor sentiment, Berkshire Hathaway, Apple holding, Shiller CAPE ratio, Buffett indicator

news.Title: The Last Time the Stock Market Was This Expensive, It Dropped Nearly 50%.
news.Content: The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) recorded a cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings (CAPE) ratio of 39.2 in February. If that number doesn't mean much to you, here's the headline: The S&P 500 has only posted a CAPE ratio this high in the lead-up to the dot-com crash of 2000. The S&P 500 lost 49% of its value over the next two-and-a-half years. What is the CAPE? The CAPE ratio is a measure of how expensive the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The S&P 500's cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings (CAPE) ratio reached 39.2 in February, a level last seen before the dot-com crash.
• Historically, CAPE ratios above 30 have implied lower forward annual returns for the S&P 500, dropping to about 2% at current levels.
• While AI revenue growth is a factor, the article suggests consumer and enterprise adoption of AI is not yet substantial enough to justify current spending.
• The Iran war and surging oil prices add recessionary risks, potentially leading to significant market declines if a recession materializes.
news.Keywords: CAPE ratio, market valuation, forward returns, AI adoption, recession risk, oil prices

news.Content: Nuclear energy is in the midst of a global renaissance. According to the World Nuclear Association, there are 75 nuclear reactors under construction with another 120 planned. • Constellation Energy (CEG), the largest U.S. nuclear power provider, is expanding capacity to meet AI data center power needs and has partnered with Microsoft.

news.Title: Micron Worries Pile Up Ahead of Rival’s $10 Billion US Listing
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Micron Technology Inc. is having a tough few weeks in the stock market, and the upcoming US listing of South Korean rival SK Hynix Inc. will only add to its challenges. Shares of Micron, the third largest maker of memory chips in the world, blasted out of the gate to start the year, soaring almost 50% in January for the second best performance in the S&P 500 Index. But lately they’ve been weighed down by concerns about the memory sector and uncertainty in the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) shares have declined over 20% from recent highs, pressured by memory sector concerns and market uncertainty due to the Iran conflict.
• The upcoming US listing of rival SK Hynix Inc., a key Nvidia supplier, could raise up to $10 billion and impact Micron's market position.
• SK Hynix leads in high-bandwidth memory (HBM) with 57% global revenue share, more than double Micron's.
• While Micron shares trade at a slight premium to SK Hynix, both are inexpensive relative to the S&P 500, and the US listing may narrow valuation gaps.
news.Keywords: memory sector, stock performance, HBM, competitive landscape, valuation, geopolitical uncertainty

news.Title: How Ford Is Becoming an AI Stock After the Wheels Fell Off Its EV Strategy
news.Content: Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) made a huge bet on electric vehicles (EVs), but ultimately had to make changes following years of steep financial losses. In December 2025, Ford announced it was canceling several planned electric vehicle models and taking a $19.5 billion write-down. ...

news.Title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Apple, Nvidia and Microsoft
news.Content: For Immediate Release Chicago, IL – April 6, 2026 – Today, Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Apple AAPL, Nvidia NVDA and Microsoft MSFT. news.Title: Heavy AI Spending Weighs on Alibaba's Profits: Hold or Fold the Stock?
news.Content: Alibaba Group BABA has staked its future on artificial intelligence (AI), channeling billions into cloud infrastructure, proprietary chip development and the relentless rollout of frontier large language models. Yet the deeper the company wades into this spending cycle, the worse its financials appear. What was once a reliably profitable e-commerce giant now resembles a company sacrificing present earnings for a future that may take years to materialize. As profitability crumbles and free cash flow dries up under the weight of unprecedented capital expenditure, BABA is beginning to look like a stock investors would ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alibaba Group (BABA) reported a sharp decline in profits for fiscal Q3 2026, with operating profit down 74% year-over-year to RMB 10.6 billion.
• Non-GAAP net profit decreased by 67% to RMB 16.7 billion, and free cash flow fell 71% to RMB 1.1 billion.
• The company's financial performance is heavily impacted by significant capital expenditures on cloud infrastructure and AI, amounting to roughly RMB 120 billion in the last four quarters.
• Management's outlook suggests ongoing capital expenditure pressures, pushing back the timeline for achieving overall profitability.
news.Keywords: profit decline, capital expenditure, AI investment, cloud infrastructure, cash flow, financial guidance

news.Title: Analysis-Investors press Amazon, Microsoft and Google on water, power use in US data centers
news.Content: By Simon Jessop, Valerie Volcovici and Supantha Mukherjee LONDON, April 6 (Reuters) - Amazon, Microsoft and Alphabet's Google have each recently abandoned construction of multibillion-dollar data centers over community opposition and now the companies are coming under shareholder pressure over the environmental impact of their projects. More from Yahoo Scout What climate commitments are tech companies struggling with? Why do investors want site-specific environmental data? How much ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Shareholders are increasing pressure on Amazon, Microsoft, and Google for more transparency regarding water usage and conservation efforts in their U.S. data centers.
• North American data centers collectively used nearly 1 trillion liters of water in 2025, roughly equivalent to New York City's annual water demand.
• While closed-loop cooling is employed, reported water usage data varies, with Meta and Google showing increases in total consumption.
• Investors emphasize the need for site-specific data to better assess operational risks and the companies' management of environmental impacts.
news.Keywords: data center sustainability, water usage, shareholder pressure, environmental data, operational risk, energy consumption

• Tesla's Q1 deliveries missed estimates, indicating softer U.S. demand, expired EV tax credits, and increased competition from BYD and legacy automakers.
• Future growth drivers like the Cybercab robotaxi and Optimus humanoid robot face execution and demand uncertainty.
news.Keywords: Sell rating, price target, downside risk, execution risk, EV demand, competition

news.Title: Prediction: Palantir Will Do the Unthinkable and Fall Below $100 Before 2026 Comes to a Close
news.Content: Although several prominent trends have come and gone since the advent of the internet in the mid-1990s, nothing has excited Wall Street and investors quite like the evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) . PwC analysts foresee this technology creating more than $15 trillion in global economic value by 2030. While much of the attention has been placed on data ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies (PLTR) stock may fall below $100 before the end of 2026 due to several headwinds.
• Potential headwinds include the possibility of an AI bubble burst, an 'unsightly' valuation with a trailing 12-month P/S ratio over 100, and a historically expensive overall stock market.
• The company's Foundry segment may struggle to scale due to the customization required for each client.
• These factors suggest that Palantir's stock could face significant downward pressure in the near term.
news.Keywords: stock prediction, valuation, AI bubble, market valuation, scalability, headwinds

news.Title: 3 Powerful Nuclear Energy Stocks to Buy in April
news.Content: Despite all the conflict and chaos happening around the world right now, one thing in Washington hasn't changed: the U.S. government's support for nuclear energy. With artificial intelligence and data center buildout driving energy demand to unprecedented levels, President Trump is reviving America's nuclear energy industry and plans to quadruple America's nuclear energy capacity to 400 gigawatts (GW) by 2050 Nuclear energy is clean and reliable and is finally getting the massive government backing it needs. With the nuclear comeback becoming official, here are three ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Constellation Energy (CEG) is the largest U.S. nuclear plant operator and clean energy producer, expanding capacity to meet AI data center demand.
• The company is restarting Three Mile Island's Unit 1 (Crane Clean Energy Center) via a 20-year power agreement with Microsoft.
• Constellation also has a 20-year power deal with Meta Platforms and a deal with data center operator CyrusOne.
• The stock is down over 20% year-to-date and nearly 35% below its 52-week high, presenting a potential buying opportunity.
news.Keywords: nuclear energy, clean energy, AI data centers, power agreements, stock performance, dividend growth

news.Title: 3 Unstoppable Stocks I Bought Last Month
news.Content: Last month was rough for growth investors. I decided to make the most of the downturn, initiating positions in three companies that I feel have fallen to attractive entry points. I bought shares of Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , Reddit (NYSE: RDDT) , and Zillow (NASDAQ: Z) (NASDAQ: ZG) in March. The stocks are currently trading 16%, 52%, and 55% below their 52-week highs. news.Title: Walmart Stock is Sounding a Warning Bell for Investors, and It's Ringing Out at Its Loudest Since the 2008 Financial Crisis. History Paints a Clear Picture of What Happens Next.
news.Content: The S&P 500 has stumbled in recent weeks and even delivered a negative performance in the first quarter of the year as it dropped 4.6%. Many investors hesitated to buy stocks, and the reason is clear: They worried about elements that could disrupt growth, from the potential for weakness in the artificial intelligence (AI) revenue story to the war in Iran. All of this has created volatility, with the index swinging from ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Walmart (WMT) stock performance relative to the S&P Global Luxury Index suggests a potential economic slowdown or recession.
• The S&P 500 has stumbled, dropping 4.6% in Q1, amid concerns about AI revenue, the Iran war, and rising oil prices.
• The S&P 500's Shiller CAPE ratio has reached levels not seen since the dot-com bubble, indicating expensive valuations.
• History suggests that high valuations and economic slowdowns often precede stock market declines.
news.Keywords: economic slowdown, recession signal, market valuation, geopolitical risk, stock performance, investor concerns

news.Title: Big Tech's second quarter just started, and it's already facing major challenges
news.Content: The year’s second fiscal quarter is officially underway, and Big Tech is already facing a number of major challenges. There’s the question about when companies will start to see significant returns on the massive sums they’re spending on AI data centers; Microsoft ( MSFT ) is contending with its worst stock performance in years; and the war in Iran and resulting fuel crisis continue to suppress shares of some of tech’s biggest names. Take a look at the Magnificent Seven stocks, and you’ll find that each is down following its most recent earnings report, despite the fact that the majority ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Big Tech companies are facing challenges in Q2, including uncertainty regarding returns on substantial AI data center investments.
• Microsoft (MSFT) is experiencing a significant stock price decline, down 22% year-to-date.
• The ongoing war in Iran and resulting fuel crisis are negatively impacting the share prices of major technology firms.
• Investors are questioning the sustainability of AI chip growth and the allocation of massive AI capital expenditures ($650 billion in 2026) by hyperscalers.
news.Keywords: AI spending, data centers, stock performance, geopolitical risk, market volatility, chip growth

news.Title: Micron Is Slumping and Rival’s $10 Billion US Listing Won’t Help
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Micron Technology Inc. is having a tough few weeks in the stock market, and the upcoming US listing of South Korean rival SK Hynix Inc. will only add to its challenges. Shares of Micron, the third largest maker of memory chips in the world, blasted out of the gate to start the year, soaring almost 50% in January for the second best performance in the S&P 500 Index. But lately they’ve been weighed down by concerns about the memory sector and uncertainty in the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) shares have declined over 20% from recent highs, pressured by memory sector concerns and market uncertainty due to the Iran conflict.
• The upcoming US listing of rival SK Hynix Inc., a key Nvidia supplier, could raise up to $10 billion and impact Micron's market position.
• SK Hynix leads in high-bandwidth memory (HBM) with 57% global revenue share, more than double Micron's.
• While Micron shares trade at a slight premium to SK Hynix, both are inexpensive relative to the S&P 500, and the US listing may narrow valuation gaps.
news.Keywords: memory sector, stock performance, HBM, competitive landscape, valuation, geopolitical uncertainty

news.Title: Why Evolv Technologies Stock Jumped 14.2% Last Month and Has Kept Surging in April
news.Content: Despite bearish momentum shaping the broader market in March, Evolv Technologies (NASDAQ: EVLV) stock managed to post big gains. The company's share price climbed 14.2% in the month. Over the same period, the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite declined 5.1% and 4.8%, respectively. Evolv's market-beating performance stemmed ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Evolv Technologies (EVLV) stock rose 14.2% in March, outperforming the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, driven by a Q4 sales beat and strong forward guidance.
• The company reported non-GAAP loss of $0.03 per share on $38.5 million sales in Q4, with sales up 32% YoY and GAAP net income of $10.9 million.
• Annual recurring revenue (ARR) reached $120.5 million, up 21% year-over-year.
• Evolv raised its 2026 revenue target to $172-178 million and extended contracts with the NFL's Tennessee Titans and MLB's Houston Astros.
news.Keywords: sales beat, forward guidance, ARR growth, contract extensions, AI systems, stock performance

news.Title: Why IonQ Stock Plummeted 24.9% in March
news.Content: The new year hasn't been very kind to IonQ (NYSE: IONQ) stock. After dipping nearly 11% and 4% in January and February, respectively, shares of the quantum computing powerhouse tumbled even more last month. According to data provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence , shares of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• IonQ (IONQ) stock fell 24.9% in March, influenced by a shift away from growth stocks amid the Iran conflict and analyst price target reductions.
• DA Davidson cut its price target to $35 from $55, and JPMorgan lowered its target to $42 from $47.
• Despite strong Q4 2025 financial results (429% YoY revenue growth), analysts' bearish takes impacted the stock.

news.Keywords: quantum computing, stock performance, analyst price targets, market volatility, geopolitical risk, growth stocks

news.Title: Nasdaq Pullback: 3 Stocks You'll Wish You Bought on the Dip
news.Content: There's good news and bad news for the Nasdaq Composite Index (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) . The good news is that the widely followed index has rebounded somewhat after plunging as much as 13% below its previous high. What's the bad news? The Nasdaq is still squarely in negative territory this year. But I think there's great news for investors following the steep Nasdaq pullback. Many high-quality stocks are available at a discount. Here ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) shares have declined more significantly than the Nasdaq year-to-date, but its AI prospects remain strong.
• Google Cloud revenue grew 48% YoY in Q4 2025, supported by a $240 billion backlog indicating robust AI infrastructure demand.
• Alphabet's Gemini AI integration into search is driving increased traffic and monetization opportunities.
• Nvidia (NVDA) has demonstrated resilience relative to other AI stocks, and its recent dip is viewed as a buying opportunity due to technological advancements and upcoming chip releases.
news.Keywords: AI prospects, cloud revenue, backlog, search monetization, chip technology, buying opportunity

news.Title: 2 Stock-Split Vanguard Index Funds to Buy Now. History Says They Can Crush the S&P 500 as the AI Boom Unfolds.
news.Content: Vanguard founder John C. Bogle introduced the first index fund in 1976. In doing so, his goal was to provide investors with a more reliable path to creating wealth in the stock market as compared to buying stakes in individual companies. "Don't look for the needle in the haystack," he said. "Just buy the haystack." Today, Vanguard remains a premiere issuer of index funds because ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Vanguard S&P 500 Growth ETF (VOOG) and Vanguard Mega-Cap Growth ETF (MGK) are highlighted for their exposure to key tech stocks and upcoming stock splits.
• VOOG's top holdings include Nvidia (14.1%), Alphabet (10.7%), Microsoft (9.6%), Apple (6.4%), and Broadcom (4.9%).
• MGK's largest holdings are Nvidia (13.1%), Apple (12.5%), Alphabet (10.1%), Microsoft (9.1%), and Meta Platforms (4.6%).
• These tech-heavy ETFs are expected to outperform the S&P 500 due to their concentration in companies poised to benefit from the AI boom.
news.Keywords: index ETFs, stock split, tech sector, AI boom, market outperformance, portfolio concentration

news.Title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Sells Sandisk Stock and Buys an AI Stock Wall Street Says Is Deeply Undervalued
news.Content: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller ran Duquesne Capital Management between 1981 and 2010. The hedge fund returned about 30% annually without a single down year during that period. Today, Druckenmiller only manages his own money through Duquesne Family Office, and he made some interesting trades in the fourth quarter. He sold his entire stake in Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) , and more than tripled his stake in Google-parent Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) . Will AI create the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller sold his Sandisk (SNDK) holdings and increased his investment in Alphabet (GOOGL).
• Wall Street analysts generally consider Alphabet undervalued, with a median target price suggesting 30% upside potential.
• Sandisk, a NAND flash memory supplier, reported significant non-GAAP earnings growth of 404% in its most recent quarter.
• Alphabet's investment case is built on its digital advertising and cloud computing businesses, enhanced by AI advancements like its Gemini models.
news.Keywords: investor trades, stock divestment, stock acquisition, valuation, AI capabilities, semiconductor market

news.Title: Iran Has Threatened America's Tech Giants. Time to Sell?
news.Content: The conflict in the Middle East has led to an unexpected target: American tech giants. These companies should take this threat seriously as the IRGC has already attacked some of Amazon 's (NASDAQ: AMZN) data centers. Indeed, such attacks could slow the growth of tech companies, forcing them ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has threatened US tech giants, including Amazon (AMZN), Microsoft (MSFT), and Nvidia (NVDA), with attacks on their Middle East operations.
• Amazon has data centers in the Middle East, but they represent a small portion of its global footprint (over 900 data centers in 50+ countries).
• Microsoft's Middle East investment is also a small fraction of its massive global capex ($145 billion pledged for fiscal 2026).
• Nvidia's Middle East deals are estimated between $15 billion and $20 billion through 2029, but its fiscal 2026 revenue was $216 billion, indicating the region's limited impact.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...

• Tesla (TSLA) is facing struggles in automotive sales, with deliveries falling 9% last year and 14% in Q1 2026.
• However, Tesla's future growth is heavily tied to the robotaxi market, projected to be a $10 trillion opportunity by 2029.
• Ark Invest estimates Tesla's robotaxi business could represent ~90% of its enterprise value by 2029.

news.Title: Is Micron the New Nvidia?

• Big tech hyperscalers are forecast to spend $700 billion on AI infrastructure in 2026, and Micron is sold out of its 2026 HBM inventory.

news.Title: Did Alphabet Just Say Checkmate to Micron?
news.Content: Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) just dropped a bombshell that is sending waves through the stock market, especially in the memory chip sector. Before Alphabet's announcement, the assumption was that memory capacity for AI computing chips would be in a supply constraint for several years, leading to soaring memory prices. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's (GOOG/GOOGL) TurboQuant algorithm reduces AI memory needs by six times, potentially impacting memory chip stocks like Micron (MU) and Sandisk (SNDK).
• The algorithm's open-source nature allows competitors to integrate it, causing fear in memory chip stocks.
• The Jevons Paradox suggests that increased efficiency could lead to higher demand for memory chips as AI becomes more accessible.
• Micron's Q3 outlook projects revenue of $33.5 billion, with gross margin increasing by 660 basis points, indicating strong demand despite the TurboQuant news.
news.Keywords: AI, memory, TurboQuant, Jevons Paradox, semiconductor

news.Title: What Is the Jevons Paradox and What Does It Mean for Micron and Sandisk Investors After Google's Revolutionary AI Breakthrough?
news.Content: Last week, Alphabet 's (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) Google unveiled TurboQuant, an algorithm that marked a significant advancement in artificial intelligence (AI). Researchers said the algorithm reduces memory usage "by at least 6x and delivers up to 8x speedup, all with zero accuracy loss, redefining AI efficiency." This could reduce the amount of memory needed by as much as 83%. In the wake of this news, shares of memory chipmakers Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's (GOOGL) Google unveiled TurboQuant, an AI algorithm reducing memory usage by up to 6x and increasing speed by 8x.
• This breakthrough caused memory chip stocks like Micron (MU) and Sandisk (SNDK) to fall amid fears of reduced demand.
• The Jevons Paradox suggests that increased efficiency could lower costs and thus increase demand for memory chips, fueling AI adoption.
• Mizuho analyst Vijay Rakesh reiterated buy ratings on Micron and Sandisk, citing TurboQuant as a positive catalyst for AI adoption and component spending.
news.Keywords: AI, memory, TurboQuant, Jevons Paradox, semiconductor

news.Title: AMD vs. Nvidia: The AI Supercycle Is Big Enough for Both. Here's the Better Buy.
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) boom is creating massive winners, but not every stock riding this wave will deliver the same type of returns for investors. Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) are two of the biggest names powering the AI revolution, and both are seeing explosive demand for their chips. While the AI supercycle may be big enough for both companies to thrive, one stock still ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) has seen massive growth in AI GPUs, with revenue increasing from less than $17 billion in FY2021 to $216 billion in FY2026, driven by its CUDA platform.
• AMD is well-positioned for AI inference and agentic AI trends, securing large GPU deals with OpenAI and Meta Platforms.
• AMD's most exciting opportunity is in data center CPUs, where it leads the market and expects CPU demand to explode with the rise of AI agents.
• While Nvidia is the market leader, AMD's smaller size and significant opportunities in CPUs and GPUs make it a potentially better long-term buy.
news.Keywords: AI, GPUs, CPUs, inference, agentic AI

news.Title: The Key Technology at the Heart of the $2 Billion Nvidia-Marvell Deal
news.Content: Global GPU demand is exploding as artificial intelligence shifts from niche experiments to everyday infrastructure, with GPU as a service projected to surpass $50 billion by decade’s end. This growth is forcing data centers to rethink how compute, memory, and networking are stitched together so AI workloads can scale efficiently instead of getting choked by bottlenecks. The real challenge is designing connective technology that lets every piece of silicon in the rack work as one coherent system. Nvidia’s (NVDA) new $2 billion partnership with Marvell ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's (NVDA) $2 billion partnership with Marvell Technology (MRVL) focuses on NVLink Fusion, Nvidia's rack-scale interconnect technology.
• Marvell will design custom processing chips and high-speed networking compatible with NVLink Fusion, leveraging its CXL switches and PCIe 6.0 switches.
• This collaboration aims to enable scalable AI architectures by seamlessly integrating various components within AI racks.
• Nvidia's stock is trading at a premium valuation, while Marvell's valuation reflects a growth-adjusted discount.
news.Keywords: AI, NVLink Fusion, interconnect technology, semiconductors, partnership

news.Title: US Lawmakers Propose Crackdown on Chip Tool Sales to China
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- US lawmakers unveiled legislation that seeks to crack down on exports of chipmaking tools to China, especially from allies including the Netherlands and Japan, in a bipartisan effort to help Washington further constrain Beijing’s technology ambitions. The draft bill, introduced in the House on Thursday, would strengthen existing restrictions on semiconductor manufacturing equipment sales from firms like ASML Holding NV and Tokyo Electron Ltd. A companion version is expected to be released in the Senate later this month, according to people familiar with the matter. The goal is to subject these companies to the same, tougher curbs their ...
news.AI_Summary:
• US lawmakers have introduced legislation (MATCH Act) to crack down on chipmaking tool exports to China, including from allies like the Netherlands and Japan.
• The bill aims to strengthen existing restrictions on firms like ASML Holding NV and Tokyo Electron Ltd., subjecting them to tougher curbs faced by US rivals.
• This includes banning engineers from maintaining and repairing tools at certain Chinese facilities, impacting Applied Materials Inc., Lam Research Corp., and KLA Corp.
• The legislation seeks to align measures across US and foreign firms and broaden the scope of controlled technologies, potentially tightening restrictions for US firms as well.
news.Keywords: Export controls, China, semiconductors, chipmaking equipment, legislation
