news.Title: Should You Buy, Sell, or Hold Teradyne Stock After a 61% YTD Rise?
news.Content: Teradyne TER shares have surged 57.1% in the year-to-date period, outperforming the Zacks Computer & Technology sector’s decline of 6% and the Zacks Electronics - Miscellaneous Products increase of 20.6%. TER shares have also outperformed their peers, which include Advantest Corporation ATEYY, Cohu COHU, and KLA Corporation KLAC. Advantest Corporation, Cohu, and KLA Corporation are all expanding their footprint in the AI infrastructure space. Advantest, Cohu, and KLA shares have gained 3.3%, 36.2%, and 22.8% in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Teradyne (TER) shares have surged 57.1% year-to-date, outperforming the broader tech sector and its peers like KLA Corporation (KLAC).
• Strong AI-related demand is driving significant investments in cloud AI build-out, benefiting Teradyne's semiconductor test and robotics divisions.
• Teradyne launched Omnyx, an advanced manufacturing test platform for AI and data center applications, and the Photon 100 for opto-electric testing.
• The company expects robust growth in the semiconductor test market, with AI applications accounting for up to 70% of its revenue in Q1 fiscal 2026.
news.Keywords: AI, semiconductors, test equipment, robotics, stock performance

news.Title: LITE Stock Surges 108% YTD: Is There More Room for It to Run?
news.Content: Lumentum Holdings LITE shares have jumped a whopping 107.5% year to date, outperforming the Zacks Communication Components industry’s return of 61.5% and the broader Zacks Computer and Technology sector’s decline of 7.5%. This optical and photonic products provider’s impressive performance can be attributed to back-to-back quarters of impressive financial performance, favorable industry trends and strong fundamentals. LITE’s prospects ride on strong AI demand that is driving the need for its laser chips and optical transceivers inside data centers, as well as in the interconnect and long-haul ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Lumentum Holdings (LITE) shares have jumped 107.5% year-to-date, driven by strong AI demand for its laser chips and optical transceivers.
• The company is a critical infrastructure provider for AI data centers, benefiting from structural supply scarcity in indium phosphide lasers.
• Lumentum's cloud transceivers and optical circuit switches (OCS) are long-term growth drivers, with production capacity sold out through 2027.
• Nvidia will be a primary customer for Lumentum's new manufacturing facility in Greensboro, North Carolina, dedicated to AI data center lasers.
news.Keywords: AI, data center, optical networking, lasers, supply chain

news.Title: Here's What to Expect From NXP Semiconductors' Next Earnings Report
news.Content: With a market cap of $49.4 billion, NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NXPI) is a global semiconductor company that designs and supplies a wide range of products including microcontrollers, processors, wireless connectivity solutions, sensors, and security controllers. Its technologies serve ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) is expected to report Q1 2026 EPS of $2.61 (up 20.3% YoY) and full-year EPS of $12.48 (up 22.4% YoY).
• NXPI shares have lagged the S&P 500 and the semiconductor ETF over the past 52 weeks, falling 4.5% after its Q4 2025 results.
• Investors reacted negatively to a softer-than-expected Q1 2026 outlook, with revenue guided at a midpoint of $3.15 billion (a 6% sequential decline).
• Analysts maintain a bullish consensus with a "Strong Buy" rating and an average price target of $260.91, implying 35.3% upside.
news.Keywords: Semiconductors, earnings forecast, stock performance, analyst rating, outlook

news.Title: Lumentum (LITE) to Open Greensboro Plant for AI Data Center Lasers
news.Content: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: LITE ) is one of the best US stocks to buy and hold for the next 3 years . On March 26, Lumentum announced plans to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Lumentum Holdings (LITE) plans to establish a new 240,000-square-foot manufacturing facility in Greensboro, North Carolina, for advanced indium phosphide (InP) optical devices.
• The facility, acquired from Qorvo, will focus on lasers essential for large-scale AI data centers and will be retrofitted for 6-inch InP wafer production.
• Nvidia will be a primary customer, supporting US critical infrastructure and R&D through existing strategic agreements.
• Lumentum intends to invest hundreds of millions of dollars to enhance supply chain resilience and meet rising demand for AI networking.
news.Keywords: AI, data center, manufacturing, optical devices, Nvidia partnership

news.Title: Can Qualcomm's Snapdragon Innovations for Wearables Drive Growth?
news.Content: Qualcomm Incorporated QCOM has made a major advancement in wearable technology through its Snapdragon Wear Elite Platform, designed to power the next generation of premium smartwatches and other wearable devices. With this innovation, Qualcomm focuses on performance, efficiency and AI integration to redefine user experiences in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Qualcomm (QCOM) launched its Snapdragon Wear Elite Platform for premium smartwatches, focusing on performance, efficiency, and on-device AI.
• The platform enhances AI features like heart rate monitoring and sleep tracking, improves battery efficiency, and offers faster connectivity.
• Qualcomm faces competition from Apple (AAPL) and Alphabet (GOOGL) in the wearable market.
• Qualcomm shares have lost 17.4% over the past year, lagging the industry, and carry a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell).
news.Keywords: Wearables, AI, smartwatches, platform, stock performance

news.Title: Can INTC's Advancements in AI Inference Bolster Its Market Position?
news.Content: Intel Corporation INTC has improved artificial intelligence (AI) inference performance with its latest MLPerf Inference v6.0 results, highlighting the power of Intel Xeon 6 CPUs combined with Intel Arc Pro B-Series GPUs. The results reveal that Intel’s GPU systems can perform AI tasks quickly and efficiently across workstations, data centers and edge ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel (INTC) has improved AI inference performance with its Xeon 6 CPUs and Arc Pro B-Series GPUs, demonstrating efficient AI task execution.
• Intel's GPU systems offer up to 1.8 times better performance than older versions and support large AI models with 128GB of VRAM.
• Intel faces competition from Qualcomm (QCOM) in efficient on-device AI and AMD in AI software and PC/workstation AI tasks.
• Intel's shares have skyrocketed 114.1% over the past year, but its earnings estimates for 2026 and 2027 have declined, resulting in a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).
news.Keywords: AI inference, CPUs, GPUs, semiconductors, stock performance

news.Content: Applied Materials AMAT, being the leading manufacturer of wafer fabrication equipment products, is benefiting from the huge demand from chip manufacturers serving the AI market and the supply shortage of memory chips in late 2025, as memory production is being redirected toward high-margin AI applications, including HBM and DDR5. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Applied Materials (AMAT) is benefiting from high demand from chip manufacturers serving the AI market and a memory chip shortage.
• The company expects its leading-edge foundry, logic, DRAM, and HBM businesses to be the fastest-growing WFE segments in 2026.

news.Title: AMAT, LRCX: Bank of America Is Still Pounding the Table on These 2 Chip Stocks
news.Content: Middle East tensions linked to the Iran war have pressured several semiconductor equipment stocks, pushing them sharply lower. The situation has reignited concern about global supply chain fragility, particularly access to helium and other materials essential for chip production. This is forcing the market to rethink which companies can hold their ground if disruptions linger or even escalate. Bank of America is leaning into that debate by keeping two semiconductor equipment giants at the top of its preference list, despite the latest drawdowns. This stance suggests ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Bank of America maintains a positive outlook on Applied Materials (AMAT) and Lam Research (LRCX) despite recent semiconductor stock drawdowns due to Middle East tensions.
• AMAT is a $271.3B semiconductor equipment manufacturer with a forward P/E of 29.1x, collaborating with Micron (MU) on memory technology for AI.
• LRCX, a $266.8B semiconductor equipment company, is collaborating with IBM on sub-1 nm logic scaling, trading at a forward P/E of 40.80x.
• AMAT reported Q1 fiscal 2026 EPS of $2.39 (vs. $2.31 estimate) on revenue of $7.01B (up 3.1% YoY), with a "Strong Buy" rating and an average price target implying 12.6% upside.
news.Keywords: Semiconductor equipment, AI, stock valuation, analyst rating, collaboration

news.Title: Can TSM Meet FY26 Margin Guidance Amid Fab Expansion Cost Pressures?
news.Content: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company TSM, also known as TSMC, has consistently delivered strong gross margins over the past few quarters despite mounting cost pressures from overseas fab expansion. To capitalize on the growing demand for advanced and artificial intelligence (AI) chips, the company is expanding production outside Taiwan, including new fabs in the United ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) is expanding production globally, including five new fabrication facilities in Arizona, USA.
• Despite overseas fab expansion costs, TSMC's Q4 2025 gross margin rose 330 basis points YoY to 62.3%, with Q1 2026 guidance between 63%-65%.
• TSMC expects robust demand for advanced nodes and high factory utilization to help meet its 2026 gross margin targets.
• Intel (INTC) is investing in its foundry business with the 18A process, aiming to compete with TSMC's upcoming N2 chips.
news.Keywords: Semiconductors, AI chips, manufacturing, gross margin, global expansion

news.Title: 記憶體飆漲 手機晶片開「砍單第1槍」！專家曝這2產品下一波受害
news.Content:
記憶體報價狂飆觸發全球消費電子警報。美系外資示警，受限於記憶體成本激增，2026年全球智慧型手機出貨量面臨顯著的下修壓力，整體消費需求將受到抑制。財經專家阮慕驊分析，中東戰火已對全球景氣產生負面衝擊，而且拖愈久影響愈大，手機晶片已出現「砍單潮」，下一波是否延燒至PC與NB（筆電）市場？

記憶體漲價壓力 手機需求轉弱

阮慕驊在臉書發文表示，記憶體價格大漲正直接衝擊消費端需求。美系外資觀察，中國大陸市場手機晶片庫存已率先修正，在成本墊高情況下，智慧型手機需求逐步受到壓抑，連帶影響上游供應鏈。

他指出，包括聯發科與高通已開始下修4奈米訂單，預估減少約2萬至3萬片晶圓，約相當於晶片出貨量減少1500萬至2000萬顆；此外，相關測試供應商如京元電也出現類似砍單情況。不過，由於AI與網通需求強勁，相關產能空缺已迅速被填補，對台積電影響有限。

PC與NB需求是否受波及 市場下一波關注焦點

外資同步下修今年全球手機出貨量，預估年減13%，其中Android陣營衰退幅度達15%，至於iPhone，則因新品發表時程調整，部分機型可能由今年秋季延後至明年春季推出，影響全年出貨表現。

阮慕驊指出，外資已將聯發科手機出貨預估下修至年減2成，並調降京元電第二季營收成長預期，由原先季增15%下修至10%。他示警，手機晶片砍單已經出現，後續是否擴及PC與筆電（NB）市場，值得密切關注。

他並強調，AI伺服器與雲端服務業者對記憶體價格上漲承受力較高，但消費端對價格敏感度明顯不同。在中東戰事與通膨壓力交織下，整體物價上漲趨勢已逐步擴散，市場不宜過度期待fed降息，「不升息」恐已是對股市最有利的情境。

news.Title: 【Follow法人】面板不同調！外資棄群創拱友達 主動式ETF00981A成寵兒掃貨6.6萬張
news.Content:
（下午5時16分更新外資買賣超個股）

台股今（1）日勁揚1451.83點，收在33174.82點。三大法人聯袂買超549.82億元，其中外資回補232.51億元，終結連續4賣，主要轉買超主動統一台股增長（00919）6.6萬張；記憶體股華邦電（2344）和力積電（6770）則逆勢遭調節。分析師表示，外資買超金額不算多，僅能稱為「踩剎車」，其仍在評估後續局勢的發展，尚未出現明確的長線回補訊號。

外資今日買超前三大：主動統一台股增長、台新新光金、友達

主動統一台股增長（00919）今年來表現搶眼，吸引資金大舉湧入，外資今終結連3賣，轉買超6萬6,509張居台股買超之冠；主動復華未來50（00991A）也有3萬904張買超。

外資主要買超鋼鐵塑化股，包括中鋼（2002）1萬8,820張、南亞（1303）1萬6,451張以及台化（1326）9,229張。

外資今日賣超前三大：華邦電、力積電、群創

憶體族群今日隨著美光止跌反彈，然而，外資逆勢砍華邦電（2344）3萬628張，以及力積電（6770）2萬6,479張。盤面亮眼的面板族群則是不同調，外資出脫群創（3481）1萬3,926張，買超友達（2409）3萬3,792張。

外資僅買233億元 分析師：「踩剎車」未翻多

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今日合計買超549.82億元，其中外資買超232.51億元，終結連續4賣。外資前4個交易日共調節台股達1886.58億元。

投信續站買方，買超101.1萬元。自營商合計買超216.19億元，其中自行買賣部分買超67.6億元，避險方面買超148.58億元。

證期雙照分析師翁偉捷受訪表示，台股今日大漲逾千點，如此鉅大漲幅，外資照理應買超七、八百億元，但今日回補的量不算多，顯示其對台股的後續表現仍存有疑慮，僅能視為短期的「踩剎車」，而非全面看好回歸。

翁偉捷說明，外資持觀望態度的主要原因在於荷姆茲海峽封鎖時間的長短，對全球經濟持續產生影響。此外，根據美國總統川普最新的說法，戰爭可能還需至少兩至三周才能結束，這使得外資在作邏輯上，目前在全球資產部位仍傾向以賣超為主，對台股的買盤力道因此受限。

翁偉捷續指，外資今日動作偏向，在短期內尋找過去表現較強勢的個股進行局部布局，觀察是否有短期機會，並等待時機再進行後續的大規模回補。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等
